Particle/Animation.title: A Good Place
Particle/Animation.summary: Adds customizable animations for block placement through Resource Packs, allowing players to tweak every aspect of the animation from start to finish. Players can edit existing animations by modifying JSON files in their resource pack folder or create entirely new ones with ease. With this mod, block placement becomes a dynamic and visually engaging experience.

Particle/Animation.title: BetterGrassify
Particle/Animation.summary: Adds advanced grass and snowy terrain features to Minecraft, including Fancy Better Grass, Fast Better Grass, and enhanced snow visuals, providing more realistic and visually appealing environments. The mod also includes a Better Snow feature for improved snowy landscapes. These enhancements are available on various platforms, including OptiFine's Fancy and Fast better grass for Fabric and NeoForge.

Particle/Animation.title: Drippy Loading Screen
Particle/Animation.summary: Customize Minecraft's loading screen with Drippy Loading Screen, adding new elements, animations, and images to create a truly unique splash screen experience. This mod extends FancyMenu's features, allowing for full control over every aspect of the loading screen. Modifiers can also import and combine multiple styles, ensuring endless possibilities for their customized look.

Particle/Animation.title: Eating Animation
Particle/Animation.summary: Eating Animation brings vibrant sprite animations to edible and drinkable items in Minecraft, making mealtime more engaging and immersive. Compatible with single-player and multiplayer modes, this mod supports a wide range of popular mods, including Food+ and Botania. With the Eating Animation Mod, players can now enjoy a more dynamic and visually appealing experience when consuming food and drinks.

Particle/Animation.title: Effective
Particle/Animation.summary: Effective adds ambient particles, visual effects, and sounds to Minecraft's environment, including customizable water splashes, fireflies, waterfall clouds, and screen shake. It also introduces improved visual effects for various game features like wisps, allays, and sculk. These enhancements can be toggled in the configuration settings, allowing players to personalize their experience.

Particle/Animation.title: ExParticle
Particle/Animation.summary: ExParticle allows you to manipulate particle motion using mathematical expressions, enabling advanced simulations and visual effects in Minecraft. It includes a range of commands that let you create custom particles with precise control over their behavior, including conditional, parameterized, and animated particles. With ExParticle, you can bring your most complex ideas to life by scripting the intricate details of particle movement and appearance.

Particle/Animation.title: Elytra Physics
Particle/Animation.summary: Adds cape-like physics to the elytra when worn by the player, eliminating stiff and awkward movement while running or flying with the winged back armor. This mod enhances gameplay experience by adding a more realistic and immersive feel to Elytra usage. Compatible with both Forge and Fabric mods.

Particle/Animation.title: Euphoria Patches
Particle/Animation.summary: Euphoria Patches expands Complementary Shaders with handcrafted features that can be individually enabled or disabled by default. The mod includes a "Popular Settings" tab and preset profile to apply commonly used options easily. This add-on complements the base shaders with optional enhancements, offering players more control over their Minecraft visuals.

Particle/Animation.title: Explosive Enhancement
Particle/Animation.summary: Explosive Enhancement introduces a range of customizable particles to enhance explosion visuals. It also features an underwater explosion effect with optional bubble generation. The mod can be easily enabled or disabled through its configuration menu.

Particle/Animation.title: Exposure
Particle/Animation.summary: Exposure introduces film photography mechanics to Minecraft, allowing players to capture and develop photographs using cameras and film. The mod includes various stages of processing, from shooting and developing negatives to printing finished photographs, offering a new creative outlet for players. Additional features such as chromatic effects and an interplanar projector add depth to the photography experience.

Particle/Animation.title: Falling Leaves
Particle/Animation.summary: Adds a realistic particle effect to leaf blocks, allowing them to drop leaves at customizable rates. Users can configure which types of leaf blocks are affected and adjust spawn rates for specific trees. The mod is fully compatible with mods that add custom trees and resource packs.

Particle/Animation.title: FootprintParticle
Particle/Animation.summary: Adds footprints for mobs and players in Minecraft, customizable through settings to personalize appearance and behavior. Features include custom print textures, minecart sparks, boat trails, and various other effects such as dust on snow or waterprints when mob touches water. Highly configurable mod designed for modpacks with extensive options via Cloth Config and Mod Menu.

Particle/Animation.title: Geckolib
Particle/Animation.summary: GeckoLib provides advanced animation and rendering capabilities, including complex 3D keyframe-based animations, 30+ easings, concurrent animation support, sound and particle keyframes, and event keyframes. It also offers detailed documentation and community support for modders and players alike. With GeckoLib, Minecraft mods can create rich, dynamic experiences that go beyond the game's standard rendering capabilities.

Particle/Animation.title: Luna Slimes
Particle/Animation.summary: Smooth slime animations and configurable gameplay await in Luna Slimes, where slimes can now merge and split, emit particles, and feature unique sounds and textures based on their size. Their visuals have also been upgraded with a squish animation, new spawning and splitting animations, and pixel-consistent textures. With these changes, players can customize the behavior of slimes to suit their preferences using various configuration tools.

Particle/Animation.title: Make Bubbles Pop
Particle/Animation.summary: Makes bubble particles pop and overhauls their behavior to rise realistically to water surfaces. Also adds bubbles to opening chests, barrels, and underwater explosions, enhancing underwater gameplay experiences. Can be configured with MidnightLib for Fabric or Configured for Forge mods.

Particle/Animation.title: Perception
Particle/Animation.summary: Perception enriches Minecraft's visual experience with immersive effects that influence gameplay in a holistic way. It adds trails that follow projectiles and entities, and directional screen-shaking effects triggered by loud sounds or swift movements, intensifying immersion and situational awareness. These features combine to make every encounter feel more vivid and interactive.

Particle/Animation.title: Realistic Fire Spread
Particle/Animation.summary: Entities on fire will set flammable blocks ablaze, including projectiles like arrows. Fire spreads dynamically, simulating realistic behavior in-game. This mod introduces a more immersive and responsive fire spread system to Minecraft.

Particle/Animation.title: Sketch
Particle/Animation.summary: Sketch introduces a robust config API and animation system inspired by vanilla Minecraft's animation mechanics. It also offers data-driven registries for entity animations, custom boat types, and shield blocking/disabling events, enhancing gameplay flexibility and customization options. The mod provides additional worldgen tools, including new feature types, to further expand Minecraft's creative possibilities.

Particle/Animation.title: Sodium Extra
Particle/Animation.summary: Animations, particles, and visual details can be controlled through various settings, including customizing fire, water, lava, block animations, particles from other mods, sky, stars, sun/moon, weather, fog, static entities, and more. Additional features include display options such as FPS counters, coordinates, and toast notifications. Players can customize their Minecraft experience with a wide range of visual tweaks using Sodium Extra's intuitive settings.

Particle/Animation.title: Spawn Animations
Particle/Animation.summary: Hostile mobs now have more realistic spawn animations, digging out of the ground or bursting into existence when spawned in game worlds running Spawn Animations. This mod affects a wide range of hostile mobs, including Zombies, Skeletons, and Endermen, among others. The animations are server-side only, with options for customization available through the provided wiki and command-line interface.

Particle/Animation.title: Stylish Effects
Particle/Animation.summary: Completely overhauls status effect displays with multiple customizable modes and extensive configuration options.

Particle/Animation.title: Subtle Effects
Particle/Animation.summary: Adds a range of subtle visual and auditory effects to Minecraft, including particle trails, sounds, and textures. Key features include customizable sparks on fire blocks, snoring villagers, glowing dust around glowstone, and heartbeat sounds for players with low health. The mod also introduces particle culling and render distance management for optimized performance.

Particle/Animation.title: Visuality
Particle/Animation.summary: Adds numerous client-sided cosmetic particles to Minecraft, including crystal sparkles, mob-hitting effects, and custom slime blob particles, with an expanding collection through updates. Configurable via visuality.json or Mod Menu integration. Environmental particles enhance the game's visuals with additional effects.

Particle/Animation.title: Wakes
Particle/Animation.summary: Adds simulated wakes to fit the vanilla Minecraft spirit, including splashes when falling into water and waves appearing at boats' oars. Water effects also shoot out on either side of the splash, with extensive configs available through Midnightlib. The mod is still in development but already offers a unique visual enhancement to gameplay.

Utility/QoL.title: Accurate Block Placement Reborn
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables automatic block placement by holding the use key and looking at a new block, eliminating the need to time clicks or look carefully. This feature streamlines building and construction processes. Please note that this mod may be considered a "cheat" on some servers.

Utility/QoL.title: Advanced Loot Info
Utility/QoL.summary: Advanced Loot Info provides a clear and organized display of loot table information, allowing players to access detailed data about dropped items. This mod integrates with supported recipe viewers such as JEI, EMI, or REI to enhance gameplay analysis. Customizable features enable developers to create tailored displays for custom loot entries, conditions, functions, and categories.

Utility/QoL.title: Allay Upgrades
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds vanilla-style quality-of-life improvements to allays, allowing them to better complete their purposes. Key features include enhanced note block recall, amethyst-aided allay retention, teleportation, and auto-dismount functionality. These upgrades streamline gameplay and make managing allays more efficient in both vanilla and modded worlds.

Utility/QoL.title: AmbientSounds
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds rich ambience to the Minecraft world with customizable sound engines and smooth loops, supported by CreativeCore and compatible with world gen mods. Offers variety in regional sounds that change over time and includes a reworked engine for more options. Can be configured using the /cmdclientconfig command or the /ambient-debug command for troubleshooting.

Utility/QoL.title: AppleSkin
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds food value information to tooltips and visualizes saturation and exhaustion on the HUD. It also displays potential hunger/saturation restored while holding food, as well as health restoration, in a variety of ways. This mod enhances gameplay by providing detailed information about players' vital signs, making it easier to manage resources.

Utility/QoL.title: Auditory (Discontinued)
Utility/QoL.summary: Auditory refreshes block and item sounds with modern alternatives, adding unique sounds to previously silent blocks and actions. The mod also introduces data-driven sound management, allowing for easy editing or addition of new sounds through datapacks. With a focus on immersive audio, Auditory enhances the Minecraft experience with enhanced auditory feedback.

Utility/QoL.title: Auto Switch Elytra
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables automatic switching of Elytra wings with a double-click in mid-air and re-equips chest armor upon landing. Also disables armor stand interaction to prevent accidental use when playing with other mods that utilize armor racks. Configure keybinds through the default Right-Alt shortcut or by modifying Minecraft's settings.

Utility/QoL.title: Auto Tool
Utility/QoL.summary: Auto Tool automatically switches to the best tool in your inventory based on the block you're about to break, saving time and effort. It seamlessly integrates with Minecraft's mechanics while enhancing gameplay efficiency. This mod is perfect for all players, streamlining actions and allowing focus on building, exploring, and surviving.

Utility/QoL.title: AutoEat
Utility/QoL.summary: AutoEat automatically eats for you when your hunger drops, ensuring uninterrupted gameplay and allowing you to focus on mining, fighting, and building without interruptions. This mod offers a range of customizable features, including smart auto-eat, panic mode, and offhand support, as well as food prioritization and clean UI options. With client-side only functionality, AutoEat requires no server installation and is compatible with various Minecraft versions and loaders.

Utility/QoL.title: Auto HUD
Utility/QoL.summary: Hides unchanging parts of the HUD, such as status effects and certain UI elements, allowing for a cleaner view while still displaying essential information like remaining time on status effects and chat messages. The mod is highly configurable, including options to show or hide specific HUD components. It can be toggled with a key binding and offers customizable settings through YetAnotherConfigLib.

Utility/QoL.title: Auto-Run
Utility/QoL.summary: Hands-free walking and sprinting in Minecraft is enabled by Auto-Run, allowing players to move around without holding down movement keys or buttons. This mod simplifies navigation and frees up player control inputs for other actions. Auto-Run supports cross-version compatibility and can be installed alongside Fabric API and optional mods like Mod Menu and Cloth Config API.

Utility/QoL.title: Axiom
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds real-time previews and client-side rendering to enhance building experiences in Minecraft, simplifying the process while elevating its potential. Powered by specialized algorithms, it streamlines visual feedback and performance for improved efficiency.

Utility/QoL.title: Bartering Station Resaturated GUI
Utility/QoL.summary: Enhances the Bartering Station UI by providing a resaturated and modernized graphical interface, improving overall aesthetic appeal and player experience. The mod introduces refreshed visuals for the station's GUI, giving it a more vibrant and engaging look. This update revitalizes the user interface, making it more enjoyable to interact with the Bartering Stations in your Minecraft world.

Utility/QoL.title: Better Climbing
Utility/QoL.summary: Better Climbing enhances gameplay by allowing players to fall down ladders faster when looking down and increasing upwards climb speed. The mod also improves navigation by reducing slowdowns when walking through climbable blocks and preventing sudden "bumps" while descending into ladder shafts. Additionally, it enables jumping while standing in a climbable block, expanding player movement options.

Utility/QoL.title: Better Advancements
Utility/QoL.summary: Enhances Minecraft's advancements system with a revamped UI and customizable features, including screen-filling interfaces, colorable icons, and adjustable background effects. Offers modders additional customization options, such as custom textures and descriptions that can be tailored to fit their project. Expands gameplay experience without altering core mechanics or requiring extensive knowledge of modding.

Utility/QoL.title: BetterF3
Utility/QoL.summary: Replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable and human-readable display, offering customizable colors, positions, spacings, and more. Users can also add or delete modules, disable individual lines, and configure animations for opening/closing. This mod includes translations into multiple languages and provides an intuitive configuration menu via F3 + M.

Utility/QoL.title: Better Mount Hud
Utility/QoL.summary: No description available.

Utility/QoL.title: BetterStats
Utility/QoL.summary: View and manage Minecraft stats using the command /stats, which displays clean and modern information on player progression and achievements. The plugin also allows administrators to check any player's stats with /stats <player>. BetterStats is designed for survival, RPG, SMP, and minigames servers, adding a free premium-quality feature to enhance gameplay experience.

Utility/QoL.title: Better Third Person
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds independent camera rotation in third person view, allowing 360-degree movement and seamless transitions between walking directions without altering camera rotation. Enables placement, breaking, and item use while maintaining a freely rotatable camera. Supports vehicles, swimming, elytra flying, and more on Minecraft versions [MC 1.16+] and above.

Utility/QoL.title: Better Tridents
Utility/QoL.summary: Better Tridents introduces new trident enchantments and modifications to existing ones, enhancing gameplay and providing players with more options for customization and strategy in combat situations. Additionally, it overhauls trident recipes and behavior, offering alternative uses for this versatile tool. This mod also includes various quality-of-life tweaks to make playing with tridents even more efficient and enjoyable.

Utility/QoL.title: BoatView360
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables full 360° camera rotation while seated in a boat, removing the vanilla 210° rotation limit. This feature is essential for improved situational awareness and immersion during water travel. Compatible with other mods like Immersive Aircraft, Immersive Machinery, and Piggybacks.

Utility/QoL.title: Happy Ghast: BombsAway
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds TNT throwing mechanics that allow players to drop explosives while mounted on a Happy Ghast. Igniting TNT requires a Flint and Steel in Survival and Adventure modes, but is optional in Creative mode. This mod enhances gameplay with a fun twist on traditional TNT behavior.

Utility/QoL.title: Bomd
Utility/QoL.description: Could not find mod online. Please check the filename or search manually.
Utility/QoL.summary: Could not find mod online. Please check the filename or search manually.

Utility/QoL.title: Bookshelf
Utility/QoL.summary: Bookshelf introduces new datapack features and debugging commands that enhance gameplay and modding experience. Players can access commands to retrieve item IDs and enjoy new crafting recipes that damage items with durability rather than consuming them. The mod also provides utility functions, serialization tools, and a registry manager for modders to streamline their development process.

Utility/QoL.title: Bridging Mod
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds a bridging assist feature that enables placing blocks in gaps in front, above, or below blocks, even if the surface isn't visible, with optional crosshair and outline visual aids. This feature is similar to those found in Minecraft: Bedrock Edition and Quark mod. Available for Forge, Fabric, & Quilt.

Utility/QoL.title: Better Rubidium Video Settings Button
Utility/QoL.summary: Restores the original "Video Options" button in Minecraft's video settings menu. Instead, it adds a new button labeled "Rubidium Video Settings" that allows direct access to advanced video configuration options. This mod preserves the functionality of the classic video settings button while offering an alternative path for more detailed adjustments.

Utility/QoL.title: CameraOverhaul (Vintage)
Utility/QoL.summary: CameraOverhaul introduces dynamic camera rotations that emphasize player movement and improve visual feedback, responding to actions like strafing, turning, jumping, and falling with smooth pitch adjustments. Nearby explosions create a shaking effect, while ceasing movement causes the camera to gently sway back into place. The mod's features are highly configurable through in-game settings or manual editing of its well-documented configuration file.

Utility/QoL.title: Camera Utils
Utility/QoL.summary: Dynamic zoom, camera detaching, and advanced cinematic controls enhance gameplay experience, while adjustable third person distance and customizable perspectives provide players with versatile camera options to suit their needs. Camera Utils offers movement smoothing and a settings GUI for adjusting properties or resetting default values. This client-side mod is designed to streamline and personalize the Minecraft camera functionality.

Utility/QoL.title: Charm Of Undying
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds a new Charm slot to the player inventory, allowing for easier access and management of the Totem of Undying's death protection effect. The totem can be placed in this slot directly or through item usage, granting the same benefits as holding it in hand. This mod streamlines gameplay by freeing up hotbar and inventory space while maintaining crucial protections.

Utility/QoL.title: Chat Patches
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds support for various chat features and improves compatibility between mods, allowing for smoother communication and interaction in-game. Enhances chat functionality with custom messages, command aliases, and auto-completion capabilities. Also resolves issues related to mod conflicts and incorrect formatting, ensuring a more enjoyable Minecraft experience.

Utility/QoL.title: Cherished Worlds
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds bookmarks to worlds on the select screen, allowing players to pin favorite worlds and access them instantly. Bookmarking worlds also prevents deletion until they are unmarked, and they appear at the top of the selection list. Up to multiple worlds can be bookmarked, with internal ordering by last played date.

Utility/QoL.title: Clean Tooltips
Utility/QoL.summary: Enchantments are now displayed in their own subcategory, color-coded for easier identification of good and cursed enchantments, with max level enchants highlighted in gold. Tooltips also show remaining durability on damaged items and accurately display used colors on dyed items. A reorganized layout keeps curses at the bottom of the list for clearer visibility.

Utility/QoL.title: Client Sort
Utility/QoL.summary: Client Sort allows for easy inventory organization and management through customizable sorting rules and auto-sorting features. This mod enables players to prioritize items based on specific conditions, such as rarity, type, or stack size, streamlining their inventory and reducing clutter. With Client Sort, players can customize the organization of their inventory to suit their playstyle and preferences.

Utility/QoL.title: Client Tweaks
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds optional tweaks to improve Quality of Life during gameplay, configurable and individually enabled or disabled by default. Includes features such as disabling offhand torch placement when holding a block in the main hand or having an empty hand. Requires Balm mod for functionality.

Utility/QoL.title: Comfortable Campfires
Utility/QoL.summary: Lit campfires now provide nearby players with Regeneration or Comfort effects, depending on whether Farmer's Delight is installed, making outdoor gatherings more comfortable. The mod supports both single-player and multi-player environments, allowing for a cozy experience in either setting.

Utility/QoL.title: Configurable
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds a decentralized configuration system to Minecraft, allowing users to manage and customize game settings without requiring mod reloads or config files. Enables seamless adjustments to gameplay mechanics and visuals through an intuitive interface. Enhances player flexibility and convenience by streamlining config management.

Utility/QoL.title: Configured Defaults
Utility/QoL.summary: Configured Defaults provides customizable default configurations for Minecraft's various settings and game mechanics, offering a range of pre-built profiles to suit different playstyles or preferences. These profiles can be easily swapped in-game using a convenient GUI, allowing players to quickly adapt to new scenarios or experiment with alternative gameplay experiences. The mod's extensive configuration options empower players to tailor their gameplay experience without requiring complex modifications or code changes.

Utility/QoL.title: Continuity
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables resource packs that use connected textures, emissive textures, or custom block layers to work without OptiFine. Includes two built-in resource packs and provides seamless glass pane culling with a fix pack. Compatible with Fabric, NeoForge, and Forge through the use of dependencies like Connector and Forgified Fabric API.

Utility/QoL.title: Controlling
Utility/QoL.summary: Search keybinds by name in the KeyBinding menu to quickly locate specific bindings. A button highlights conflicting keybindings, making it easier to resolve issues. View available keys for binding and streamline your key management with Controlling.

Utility/QoL.title: Crash Assistant
Utility/QoL.summary: Crash Assistant provides an intuitive GUI to handle Minecraft crashes, analyzing logs for common issues and offering one-click solutions to upload or copy crash reports. It also offers analysis tools and auto-fixes for many known problems, including those related to GPU drivers and Java versions. Additionally, the mod warns about running on integrated GPUs when a dedicated one is available.

Utility/QoL.title: CrashExploitFixer
Utility/QoL.summary: Fixes a server crash exploit that allows malicious players to instantly crash servers on versions 1.14.4-1.21 (inclusive) by sending a single malicious packet. The mod is open-source and has been tested on over 100,000 servers through the Paper implementation. Prevents malicious players from crashing servers with ease, ensuring a smoother gameplay experience.

Utility/QoL.title: CreativeCore
Utility/QoL.summary: CreativeCore provides a core set of features and functionalities for Minecraft mods, including a GUI API, packet system, event system, and config system with in-game options or console commands. It also introduces performance improvements, such as fixing huge lag spikes, and allows for platform-independent mod loading. This mod sets the foundation for other creative mods to build upon, simplifying development and playability.

Utility/QoL.title: BTA Cupboards
Utility/QoL.summary: Introduces vertical and mirrored cupboards that connect like doors, providing additional storage options to chests. Features a json config framework, full stacktrace crashes, log erroring commands, and debug options for chunk loading logging. Adds a new way to organize items in your Minecraft world with versatile cupboard functionality.

Utility/QoL.title: Debugify
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds over 70 bug fixes to Minecraft, resolving issues found on the official bug tracker, effectively replacing more than a dozen superseded mods and incorporating various fixes from other mods. This comprehensive fix mod addresses problems with game stability, performance, and user interface, streamlining gameplay experience. By rectifying these long-standing bugs, Debugify ensures a smoother and more enjoyable Minecraft experience for players.

Utility/QoL.title: Deimos
Utility/QoL.summary: Generates and displays customizable config files in-game, simplifying mod development and configuration management through a user-friendly interface that can be accessed via Mod Menu on Fabric or natively on Forge and Neoforge. Enables dynamic recipe creation at game start with configurability, reducing the need for JSON files and streamlining version updates. Based on MidnightLib's configuration principles, Deimos enhances mod development efficiency and flexibility.

Utility/QoL.title: Delete Worlds To Trash Forge
Utility/QoL.summary: Deletes worlds to the recycle bin/trash instead of permanently deleting them, giving players a chance to reconsider and potentially retrieve their creations later. This feature is supported on Windows, Mac, and some Linux systems. A vanilla delete option remains available for unsupported operating systems.

Utility/QoL.title: Do a Barrel Roll
Utility/QoL.summary: Elytra flight gets a thrilling upgrade with "Do a Barrel Roll". This mod unlocks full camera orientation control in flight, allowing players to roll, pitch, and yaw freely. Players can customize their experience with various options, including banking and sensitivity settings.

Utility/QoL.title: Door Knocking
Utility/QoL.summary: Knock on doors to signal your presence and avoid surprise attacks when attacking blocks that open as doors in survival mode. This mod enhances gameplay by allowing players to knock instead of force-opening locked doors, promoting a safer experience. By introducing a non-violent door-knocking mechanism, Door Knocking adds a new dimension to Minecraft's combat system.

Utility/QoL.title: DoubleDoors
Utility/QoL.summary: Allows players to open two doors facing each other simultaneously, streamlining door management and enhancing gameplay flexibility. Enables double doors to function as expected with manual or automated opening methods, such as button activation.

Utility/QoL.title: Dynamic Crosshair
Utility/QoL.summary: Hides or changes the crosshair depending on context, providing options to customize its visibility and style based on what you're looking at or equipped with. Configurable settings allow for tailored gameplay experiences. Enhances the Minecraft experience by minimizing distractions and adding a customizable touch to your gameplay interface.

Utility/QoL.title: Easy Anvils
Utility/QoL.summary: Easy Anvils simplifies item enchanting and repairing by allowing players to right-click on anvil blocks in survival mode. This feature eliminates the need to place an anvil and interact with it as a block, streamlining the process for enchanting and repairing tools, armor, and other items.

Utility/QoL.title: Economical Villager Trading
Utility/QoL.summary: Economical Villager Trading introduces a more realistic and dynamic trading system to Minecraft servers, allowing villagers to offer valuable items in exchange for goods that are in high demand on the market. This mod enables a more intricate economy within the game, providing players with opportunities to specialize in specific trades and earn rewards accordingly. By simulating real-world economic principles, Economical Villager Trading adds depth to Minecraft's gameplay and encourages strategic decision-making among players.

Utility/QoL.title: Elytra Drag
Utility/QoL.summary: Elytra Drag introduces a drag mechanism while flying with elytras, allowing players to slow down or break by pressing the Sneak key and halting rocket propulsion. It also limits damage taken during high-velocity landings by capping fall distance, and modifies wing animations when applying drag. The mod's settings can be adjusted through its config file, affecting the drag coefficient, fall distance cap, and minimum speed required for drag application.

Utility/QoL.title: EMI Enchanting
Utility/QoL.summary: Displays detailed enchantment information through an intuitive plugin for the EMI Recipe and Item viewer, including basic summaries, valid items, enchantment descriptions, and conflict exclusions. Tab through various screens to access this information. Enhances gameplay by providing a clear understanding of enchantments.

Utility/QoL.title: EMI Loot
Utility/QoL.summary: EMI Loot displays loot tables for chests, blocks, and mobs, showing the probability of each item drop in a compact, visually organized format. This includes stacked items by percentage category, with hover-over effects displaying average expected counts. The mod provides an intuitive way to analyze and understand complex Minecraft game mechanics.

Utility/QoL.title: EMI
Utility/QoL.summary: EMI offers a comprehensive item and recipe viewer with features such as quick crafting, favorite recipes, and a recipe tree that breaks down complex crafts into every step, base ingredients, and leftovers. Additionally, it provides smart display of tags, breakdowns of base costs, tooltips for recipes and ingredients, and binds for quick crafting into the inventory or creative menu. This mod optimizes user experience with a streamlined interface and zero dependencies.

Utility/QoL.title: VoidUtils
Utility/QoL.summary: VoidUtils provides essential patches to prevent exploits and performance threats on Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 servers running Bukkit 1060. It includes features like anti-coordination logging, bedrock protection, and piston dupe prevention, as well as optional xAuth integration for enhanced security. This mod is ideal for anarchy or vanilla servers looking to safeguard against common exploits and bugs.

Utility/QoL.title: FallingTree
Utility/QoL.summary: FallingTree introduces four modes of tree breaking, including instantaneous and animated falls with blocks or items. Players can customize settings in the config file to adjust what constitutes a tree, tool options, and animation effects. The mod enhances gameplay by streamlining tree harvesting and providing more flexibility.

Utility/QoL.title: FancyMenu
Utility/QoL.summary: FancyMenu offers visual customization and layout editing capabilities to personalize Minecraft's menus with unique styles and features, including animated elements. A built-in editor allows users to easily tweak layouts and customize menus without extensive technical knowledge. With both client-side and optional server-side installation available, users can enhance their in-game interface and streamline GUI management.

Utility/QoL.title: Anim´s Bar
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds a completely retextured and golden-themed user interface, including health, hunger, and XP bars, as well as a Golden HotBar. The mod also features transparent backgrounds and clean pixel art, providing an improved visual experience for players. Compatible with Minecraft versions 1.6.1-1.21.x.

Utility/QoL.title: Fishing Real
Utility/QoL.summary: Fishing Real introduces live entities to fishing, replacing caught fish items with their living counterparts, and allows for custom item-to-entity conversions using datapack configurations. Players can craft specific entities by adding NBT tags to their datapack JSON files. This mod enables users to override vanilla fishing entity options by creating a custom datapack with the namespace "fishingreal".

Utility/QoL.title: Fixed Villager Trades
Utility/QoL.summary: Villager trades are now fixed to their profession upon generation, preventing changes after workstation replacement. This affects librarian villagers and Mending Enchantments, making them more accessible. The mod also limits maximum trade discounts to 50%.

Utility/QoL.title: FullStack Watchdog
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables detailed log output when the Watchdog system kills a stuck server, providing full stacktraces to aid in diagnosing deadlock issues. This information helps mod creators and server administrators track down the cause of deadlocks and optimize their code for better performance. Can be used on both standalone servers and within modpacks.

Utility/QoL.title: Fzzy Config
Utility/QoL.summary: Fzzy Config offers automatic GUI generation, server-client sync, and advanced validation features to simplify mod configuration. Its multi-loader support allows seamless integration across different Minecraft platforms, including Fabric and Forge. The mod's lightweight API ensures minimal integration requirements for developers.

Utility/QoL.title: Grind Enchantments
Utility/QoL.summary: Grind Enchantments introduces two features to the grindstone: disenchanting enchanted items onto a book and moving enchantments between books by swapping them in the grindstone's slots. This allows for efficient organization of enchantment-enabled items and separation of multi-type enchantments on a single book. Supports seamless integration with Tax Free Levels mod.

Utility/QoL.title: Hardcover
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds an alternative recipe book layout with extra space and improved navigation buttons, allowing for more efficient crafting management. Also introduces features such as auto-closing recipe books, circular scrolling, and mouse wheel scrolling to enhance gameplay experience. Additionally, the mod provides customizable options like inverted scroll direction and centered inventory display.

Utility/QoL.title: Highlighter
Utility/QoL.summary: Highlights items in your inventory with distinct colors based on enchantments and item types, making it easier to identify and manage equipment. Enchantments like piercing and multishot are color-coded for distinction, as well as totems and other item categories. This mod enhances inventory organization and visual clarity for players.

Utility/QoL.title: Iceberg
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds new events, helpers, and utilities to make modding easier on both client and server side for Forge mods. Provides additional functionality to enhance mod development experiences. Can be used in modpacks or as a dependency for individual mods.

Utility/QoL.title: IJM's Tweaks
Utility/QoL.summary: Forces dark loading overlays and adjusts various client-side settings, such as auto-jump on stairs, experience bar visibility in creative mode, and fullbright options. Also includes features like reduced particle effects when breaking blocks and customizable zoom functionality via keybindings. Invisible entity hitboxes can be rendered using F3 + B for OP players on dedicated servers.

Utility/QoL.title: Immersive Machinery
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds a range of rustic machinery for transporting, mining, and automating tasks in Minecraft, while maintaining a vanilla-style aesthetic. Features a primitive submarine, Copperfin, for underwater exploration, as well as a large tunnel digger for excavating earth efficiently. Provides tools to automate repetitive tasks, expanding gameplay possibilities.

Utility/QoL.title: Immersive Hotbar
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds animated hotbar slots and tooltips to enhance immersion in Minecraft gameplay, allowing for a more engaging experience when placing blocks, picking up items, and using tools and weapons. The mod also includes customizable animations, such as bouncy or shrink styles, which can be configured through the in-game config menu. This results in smoother and more visually appealing hotbar interactions, further immersing players in the Minecraft world.

Utility/QoL.title: ImmersiveThunder
Utility/QoL.summary: ImmersiveThunder introduces dynamic thunder sounds that respond to your distance from the source. Sounds become louder and more intense up close, but softer and delayed at a distance, creating a more immersive experience.

Utility/QoL.title: Inventory Hud +
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds live durability tracking and inventory previews to Minecraft's HUD, allowing players to monitor gear status at all times and make informed decisions in combat. This mod displays armor and tool durability on screen, as well as a preview of inventory items, to keep players battle-ready without cluttering the UI. Perfect for PvP, UHC, and competitive survival, it enhances tactical awareness with minimal footprint.

Utility/QoL.title: InvMove
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables moving, jumping, and sprinting from within inventories/screens, while also allowing toggling of these features on or off per-screen in the config menu. Hides the darkened background tint in screens that don't pause the game, further enhancing gameplay freedom. This mod provides seamless navigation between inventory management and exploration.

Utility/QoL.title: Iris/Oculus Shader Folder
Utility/QoL.summary: Hides, filters, and reorders shader packs in the Iris/Oculus shaders menu using flexible patterns, allowing users to customize their shader selection experience with features like name recoloring, tooltip addition, and unwanted pack suppression. Organizes the menu for a faster and cleaner shader selection process. Recolors shader pack names or parts of names with Minecraft color for improved visual organization.

Utility/QoL.title: Item Descriptions
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables concise descriptions for blocks, items, entities, and enchantments by displaying them when holding Ctrl key, streamlining information without needing external resources. Supports vanilla content and popular mods like Mod Descriptions and Jade/WTHIT. Provides a clear understanding of each item's purpose, origin, or other essential details.

Utility/QoL.title: Jade 🔍
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds a revamped information HUD to Minecraft, providing users with essential details and features in a modernized API design. Features customizable keys for navigating menus and displaying information, including liquid amounts, item storage, and brewing stand fuel levels. Requires server-side installation for full functionality, but can be installed client-side for basic use.

Utility/QoL.title: Just Hammers
Utility/QoL.summary: Minecraft receives a boost in mining efficiency with the addition of hammers capable of excavating 3x3, 3x3x3, and even 5x5x5 areas. These versatile tools come in various tiers, including Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite, with increasing areas of effect as you upgrade. The mod's hammers are durable and can be repaired using an anvil when their durability drops to one.

Utility/QoL.title: Keybind Fix
Utility/QoL.summary: Minecraft players can now map multiple keybindings to the same key without losing functionality thanks to Keybind Fix. This mod resolves conflicts where two or more keybindings are set to the same key, allowing for simultaneous execution of both actions. Compatible keybinds will work together, enhancing gameplay flexibility and convenience.

Utility/QoL.title: Kiwi 🥝
Utility/QoL.summary: Kiwi 🥝 enhances your Minecraft experience with quality-of-life features, including customizable tooltips that display item NBT and tags, and a command calculator `/kalc` to streamline gameplay. Additionally, it disables Microsoft telemetry and suppresses experimental world settings warnings, providing a more streamlined and secure environment. With Kiwi, you can also customize various settings using Cloth Config, giving you finer control over your Minecraft experience.

Utility/QoL.title: KleeSlabs
Utility/QoL.summary: Breaks only one half of a double slab when looking at it, allowing for more precise placement and building control. Supports both Vanilla and modded slabs from various mods. Enhances building flexibility by enabling targeted slab removal.

Utility/QoL.title: Language Reload
Utility/QoL.summary: Language Reload enhances Minecraft's language features with fast switching between languages without reloading resource packs, a search box in the language menu, and multilingual item search capabilities. It also allows multiple language selection, automatic language detection, and customizable keyboard shortcuts for language management. With these features, players can seamlessly navigate their game environment across different languages.

Utility/QoL.title: Litematica
Utility/QoL.summary: Litematica provides advanced schematic rendering and editing capabilities to Minecraft, building upon the features of its predecessor Schematica. It offers a range of tools, including direct hotkeys for configuring menus and toggling rendering modes, allowing players to efficiently manage schematics in-game. With Litematica, players can easily edit and manipulate schematics, streamlining their creative process and enhancing gameplay experience.

Utility/QoL.title: Log Begone
Utility/QoL.summary: Removes annoying log spam from your Minecraft experience by suppressing messages about missing structures, biomes, blocks, and items when they are removed or unloaded. By default, it also silences "the_aether" log messages. This mod streamlines gameplay by reducing clutter in the game's console output.

This feature eliminates the need to rush to discover structures first and encourages players to explore existing environments without finding unwanted items. By providing individualized looting experiences, Lootr enhances gameplay dynamics and reduces world size growth.

Utility/QoL.title: Magnum Torch
Utility/QoL.summary: Magnum Torch introduces three extremely powerful torch variants that create large areas where natural mobs cannot spawn, effectively preventing unwanted enemies from entering these regions. The mod's functionality complements existing game mechanics by adding a new layer of control over mob spawning. By using these enhanced torches, players can better manage and optimize their gameplay experience.

Utility/QoL.title: Map Distance Fix
Utility/QoL.summary: Always Visible Player indicators and Correct Direction tracking make navigation easier on treasure maps and other map items. Map Distance Fix also displays distance from the player to the map center, configurable via a JSON file or in-game GUI. This client-side mod requires no server modifications.

Utility/QoL.title: [HTP] Minecells | Spanish Translation Pack
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds Spanish translations to the Minecells mod, supporting all variations of the language. Provides accurate and consistent translations throughout the game, enhancing the overall gaming experience for Spanish-speaking players. Contributes to the growing library of translated mods in the Minecraft community.

Utility/QoL.title: Minerally
Utility/QoL.summary: Minerally generates ore piles, crystals, geodes, and mineral rocks in caves, deepslate caves, and the Nether. These structures require repeated mining to obtain resources, except for mineral rocks and geodes. The mod introduces a new type of resource gathering mechanic to Minecraft's exploration experience.

Utility/QoL.title: MiscTweaks
Utility/QoL.summary: MiscTweaks enhances gameplay by eliminating annoying mechanics and optimizing player experiences. It includes tweaks such as dropping all items from creeper explosions, disabling shulker duplication on hit, and faster mining of obsidian-like blocks. The mod also adjusts shield visibility when held in the offhand and adds configuration options for tweaking these features.

Utility/QoL.title: More Useful Copper
Utility/QoL.summary: Copper has been overlooked in Minecraft, but this mod brings it to life by adding copper variants to default items and expanding its unique uses with additional crafted items. This expansion allows players to craft new useful items, giving copper a much-needed boost in functionality. With More Useful Copper, your game just got a whole lot more interesting!

Utility/QoL.title: MoreChatHistory Reforged
Utility/QoL.summary: Increases the vanilla chat history length from 100 messages to 16384, ensuring you never miss important conversations during gameplay or when away from the keyboard. No longer will crucial chat messages be lost due to limited storage space. Browse up to 16,384 messages in the chat box with this client-side mod.

Utility/QoL.title: More Mouse Tweaks
Utility/QoL.summary: More Mouse Tweaks enhances Minecraft by introducing extra mouse functions, building upon the existing Mouse Tweaks mod to further enhance gameplay and user experience. It provides additional features to streamline interactions, allowing players to access a wider range of commands and tools with greater ease. This expansion enables more efficient navigation and manipulation within the game world.

Utility/QoL.title: More Mouse Tweaks (MouseTweaks-fabric-mc1.21-2.26.jar)
Utility/QoL.summary: Enhances mouse controls by adding extra functions to improve player navigation and interaction with the game world. Adds features such as customizable mouse sensitivity and acceleration settings. Provides a more intuitive way of navigating Minecraft's vast environments using your computer's mouse.

Utility/QoL.title: MrUltimateShop
Utility/QoL.summary: Minecraft servers gain advanced trading capabilities through MrUltimateShop's dynamic shop loading system and customizable features such as holographic price displays, tax systems, and vault economy integration. The mod introduces a player-owned chest shop system and team-based shop management, enabling collaborative ownership and real-time shop information. It also includes a comprehensive permission system and extensive customization options for configuring shop settings.

Utility/QoL.title: Wilderness Wayfinder
Utility/QoL.summary: Crafts a compass that helps find elusive biomes by cycling through all biomes and displaying the direction to the selected one. The Wayfinder can be used in multiplayer servers but may cause lag if searching over long distances. It's recommended to keep the item selected while it searches for the biome, providing real-time updates on its location.

Utility/QoL.title: NetherCoords
Utility/QoL.summary: Converts Overworld and Nether coordinates instantly with customizable Y offset, automatic language switching, and tab completion for easier navigation between dimensions in Minecraft. The mod includes two commands: `/nc o` to convert Overworld to Nether and `/nc n` to do the reverse, perfect for survival, speedrunning, or server management. With its lightweight client-side design, it supports Paper 1.21-1.21.10 versions and can be easily dropped into a plugins folder.

Utility/QoL.title: Translate the mod NotEnoughAnimations
Utility/QoL.summary: NotEnoughAnimations now supports Russian language compatibility, offering players an intuitive and barrier-free experience in their native tongue. The translation adheres to professional localization standards, ensuring accurate and high-quality rendering of game content. This update enhances gameplay for Russian-speaking users, providing a seamless interaction with the modification's features.

Utility/QoL.title: Overflowing Bars
Utility/QoL.summary: Overflowing Bars adds customizable and overflowable bars to Minecraft's GUI elements, allowing players to track various statistics and progress more effectively. The mod provides a range of features, including color customization, animation options, and support for multiple data types. By giving players greater visibility into their game state, Overflowing Bars enhances the overall gameplay experience.

Utility/QoL.title: Paxi
Utility/QoL.summary: Global data and resource packs are now automatically loaded for every world, eliminating the need to load them separately in each world through the creation of a central "paxi" folder in the Minecraft config directory. This utility mod is perfect for modpack creators who want to simplify their workflow by consolidating data and resources into one accessible location.

Utility/QoL.title: Peek
Utility/QoL.summary: Peek adds various utility features to Minecraft, providing extra information about items and blocks such as shulker box contents, bee nest capacities, explorer map markers, compass destinations, and more. Additionally, it reveals effects of suspicious stews and highlights pick-blocked containers. This Fabric mod enhances exploration and gameplay by offering these additional details, useful for players seeking to optimize their gameplay experience.

Utility/QoL.title: Physics Mod
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds interactive ragdolls and item physics to Minecraft, allowing mobs to fracture and blocks to crumble. Physics Mod also enables customizable gravity and environments, including support for planetary settings like Mars and Pluto. Players can explore immersive collapsing caves and experience a new level of interactivity in the game's world.

Utility/QoL.title: Pickup Notifications
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables popup notifications when picking up items, showcasing the raw item icon and name, as well as experience orbs. Configurable options allow customization of notification behavior, appearance, and offset. Notifications can be toggled on or off through a simple configuration setting.

Utility/QoL.title: Ping Wheel
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables players to mark in-game locations with customizable pings, viewable by all players and displaying player names when held. The default keybind is Mouse5 (Forward), but can be changed via the `/pingwheel config` or Mod Menu. Item Icons can also be enabled to reflect item textures on markers.

Utility/QoL.title: Polymorph
Utility/QoL.summary: Polymorph resolves recipe conflicts by allowing players to choose between multiple possible outputs shared by the same ingredients in crafting, smelting, and smithing screens. A button appears above the output slot when a conflict is detected, offering a list of potential results to select from. The mod also features a command to identify potential conflicts across various recipes.

Utility/QoL.title: Portable Crafting
Utility/QoL.summary: Portable Crafting enables seamless access to crafting screens from your inventory, allowing you to open workstation blocks by right-clicking them or using them from the hotbar. You can quickly craft, smith, and more with minimal interruptions, thanks to server-side functionality that's polished when installed on the client. Additionally, a customizable config file lets you add support for modded non-container workstations.

Utility/QoL.title: Potion Stacking
Utility/QoL.summary: Potion Stacking allows potions of all types to stack up to 16 in your inventory, freeing up valuable space and simplifying potion management. Modded potions are also supported for a seamless experience. Additionally, splash and lingering potions now have a 1-second cooldown between uses to maintain balance.

Utility/QoL.title: Quartz Elevator
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds Quartz Elevators and Smooth Quartz Elevators to the game, allowing players to teleport vertically between elevators with the same (x, z) coordinates using jump or crouch actions. Craft these elevators using quartz-related materials in various recipes. Elevators enable seamless vertical travel across map distances.

Utility/QoL.title: Raised
Utility/QoL.summary: Raises the GUI to your fingertips! Allows you to move around in-game HUD elements and hotbar selector, giving you full control over their placement on screen. Now you can customize your Minecraft interface to fit your playstyle with Raised's versatile layer management system.

Utility/QoL.title: Reacharound
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds support for placing blocks downwards and upwards, allowing for more flexible build designs. Configurable indicator types provide customization options in mod menu settings. Smart slab placement ensures seamless bridging between slabs with reduced skipping.

Utility/QoL.title: Recipe Book is Pain
Utility/QoL.summary: Recipe Book is Pain adds creative tabs to the recipe book, making it more useful in modpacks. It also introduces group pages, allowing for more organized and extensive tab management. This mod enhances player convenience by streamlining access to recipes and item information.

Utility/QoL.title: Recipe Tweaks
Utility/QoL.summary: Recipe Tweaks enhances Minecraft's crafting system by introducing more consistent recipes and time-saving features, allowing players to create items without needing a crafting table in many cases, and adding renewable decorative blocks for convenience. This mod also optimizes gameplay mechanics with convenient additions and fairer item creation processes. It offers an improved user experience through streamlined crafting possibilities.

Utility/QoL.title: Reese's Sodium Options
Utility/QoL.summary: Replaces Sodium's Options Screen with search bar, scrollable tabs and pages, and improved slider functionality. Allows changing slider values while holding down the SHIFT key and scrolling, enhancing overall user experience. Includes an Iris Shader Pack Button for easy access to shader options.

The mod also provides configuration options for customizing spawn rates and mob behavior.

Utility/QoL.title: Remove Reloading Screen
Utility/QoL.summary: Removes all non-essential elements from the reload screen, leaving only the progress bar to provide an uninterrupted experience. The mod is designed to make the game more accessible by eliminating distractions and keeping players focused on their progress. It is free and open-source, allowing users to include it in their modpacks with proper attribution.

Utility/QoL.title: Raise Sound Limit Simplified
Utility/QoL.summary: Raises Minecraft's sound sources limit to 4095 in a simplified way, eliminating the need for complex configurations or mod combinations. This modification enables more immersive gameplay experiences with enhanced audio capabilities.

Utility/QoL.title: Craft Saddle
Utility/QoL.summary: Craft Saddle provides a new crafting recipe for the saddle in Minecraft, allowing players to craft this essential item without relying on drop-in resources or other mods. This addition streamlines gameplay and reduces dependence on external sources, giving players more flexibility and control over their world-building process. With Craft Saddle installed, players can focus on exploring and expanding their creations with greater ease and convenience.

Utility/QoL.title: Screenshot Viewer
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables in-game management and viewing of taken screenshots, including accidental ones. Features a GUI with navigation and zooming capabilities, and can be accessed from the title screen or pause menu via a configurable key binding. Configurable through CatConfigMC for a seamless user experience.

Utility/QoL.title: Searchables
Utility/QoL.summary: Searchables provides helper methods that allow for searching and filtering elements based on components, as well as built-in auto-complete functionality. This includes a visually appealing auto-complete feature that simplifies finding specific items in-game. By offering improved search capabilities, Searchables enhances the overall Minecraft experience for players.

Utility/QoL.title: Smooth Scrolling Refurbished
Utility/QoL.summary: Smooth scrolling has been reimagined in Minecraft with Smooth Scrolling Refurbished, replacing the original scrollbar on most screens to create a more fluid and seamless experience. This mod aims to replicate the functionality of its predecessor, Smooth Scrolling Everywhere, without relying on any code from the original project. By adopting this new scrolling mechanic, players can navigate menus and inventories with greater ease and efficiency.

Utility/QoL.title: Sound Physics Remastered
Utility/QoL.summary: Sound Physics Remastered enhances Minecraft's audio experience by introducing realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks. The mod optimizes sound processing performance, allowing for more immersive gameplay. Its advanced features also support seamless voice chat functionality with Simple Voice Chat 2.X.X.

Utility/QoL.title: StackRefill
Utility/QoL.summary: Automatically refills your hotbar with matching stacks from inventory during gameplay, ensuring uninterrupted building and adventuring without manual item management. Utility/QoL.summary: Adds customizable bars to the status effects overlay and inventory to show remaining effect durations, including automatic hiding of cluttered or lengthy effects. Utility/QoL.title: Suggestion Tweaker
Utility/QoL.summary: Improves filtering and sorting of suggestions in Minecraft by introducing multiple filtering modes and customizable prefix hiding. Filtering modes range from STRICT to VERY LOOSE, allowing for more flexible searches. Also enhances suggestion organization by separating filtered server-side content from client-side content.

Utility/QoL.title: TalkBubbles
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds bubbles above your head when chatting with nearby friends, creating a fun and visual way to communicate in-game. This client-sided mod requires Cloth Config and is developed specifically for Fabric, with no plans for a Forge version. It's perfect for adding a playful touch to your multiplayer experience!

Utility/QoL.title: Tom's Trading Network
Utility/QoL.summary: Adds a simple trading machine that allows players to set up one-trade vendors in claimed chunks, eliminating the need for interact permissions. Items can be inserted or extracted on configured sides, and right-clicking on item stacks in the configuration GUI provides additional options. This vending machine streamlines player-to-player trading in Minecraft worlds.

Utility/QoL.title: ToolTipFix
Utility/QoL.summary: Stops tooltips that are too large to fit on the screen from running off the screen, and automatically wraps long tooltips with line breaks for easier reading. This feature helps improve visibility and usability in game menus and interfaces. The mod corrects a common issue where excessive tooltip text spills beyond the edges of the screen.

Utility/QoL.title: TooltipRareness
Utility/QoL.summary: Divides items into rareness groups and displays them as tooltips, enhancing the game's RPG feel by providing more nuanced item information. Rareness groups are visualized in a tooltip format, allowing players to easily distinguish between different rarity levels. This mod adds a new layer of depth to Minecraft's inventory management system.

Utility/QoL.title: Trading Post
Utility/QoL.summary: Enables players to trade items and resources with NPCs in various locations throughout the game world, adding a new layer of commerce and economy to Minecraft gameplay. Trading Posts can be built using specific blocks and offer a range of trading options, including item exchanges and resource purchases. This mod introduces a new way for players to acquire rare or hard-to-find materials and items without relying on traditional mining or crafting methods.

Utility/QoL.title: Trinkets
Utility/QoL.summary: Minecraft gets a sleek and organized slot system with Trinkets, which introduces 6 default slot groups for various body parts, allowing mods to request specific slots for a clutter-free experience. This data-driven mod is accessible and easy to use through its intuitive user interface. Players can customize their inventory by adding or creating new slot groups according to their needs.

Utility/QoL.title: Trivia

Questions can be configured to timeout after a specified time if not answered, and the plugin supports MiniMessage formatting for custom messaging. Players can use commands to reload configs, set question intervals, and start quizzes manually.

By providing an alternative crafting interface, Visual Workbench enhances the game's building and exploration experience with improved organization and efficiency.

This simplifies the gameplay experience and reduces unnecessary prompts. Eliminates an often-irksome aspect of Minecraft's startup process.

Utility/QoL.title: Yungs Better Desert Temples
Utility/QoL.summary: Redesigned desert temples offer thrilling puzzles, traps, and parkour challenges, yielding better loot than vanilla versions. Mining fatigue is applied by default, but can be lifted once a temple is cleared or disabled in the config. This mod seamlessly integrates with various worldgen mods, including YUNG's other popular expansions.

Utility/QoL.title: Yungs Menu Tweaks
Utility/QoL.summary: No description available.

Utility/QoL.title: Zoomify
Utility/QoL.summary: Zoomify adds a new dimension to Minecraft, allowing players to explore and zoom in on blocks and structures at incredible resolutions up to 256x256. This mod provides an unparalleled level of detail, making it perfect for architects, builders, and anyone who wants to take their Minecraft creations to the next level. By increasing the game's resolution, Zoomify enables a more immersive experience and new opportunities for creative expression.

Adventure/RPG.title: Advanced Netherite
Adventure/RPG.summary: Advanced Netherite introduces four new tiers of Netherite, each with its own unique properties and equipment sets, including armor, tools, and blocks. The mod adds depth to the vanilla Minecraft experience by providing more goals to achieve through its configurable and open-source design. New tier-specific perks and drops further enhance gameplay possibilities.

Adventure/RPG.title: Archers Expansion (More RPG Classes)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Archers Expansion introduces a range of Archery Sub-Classes that enhance the ranged combat experience, offering various skills and spells to unlock through Spell Books and Spell Binding Tables. These additions provide new ways to engage in combat, making gameplay more enjoyable for players who prefer ranged weapons. By incorporating these features, the mod expands on the existing archery mechanics, providing a fresh layer of depth to Minecraft's combat system.

Adventure/RPG.title: Archers (RPG Series)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds a comprehensive archery system to Minecraft, allowing players to master various bows and projectiles in a realistic and immersive RPG experience. Features detailed mechanics for drawing and releasing arrows, along with customizable equipment and attributes. Integrates seamlessly with Spell Engine and other RPG Series mods for an enhanced gameplay experience.

Adventure/RPG.title: Arcwise - Puffish Skill Tree
Adventure/RPG.summary: Arcwise introduces a skill tree system utilizing Pufferfish Skills & Attributes, allowing players to unlock abilities such as increased attack speed, melee damage, and resistance. As players progress through levels, they can earn experience points by killing various entities, with different swords yielding varying XP outputs. The mod supports multiple versions of Minecraft and is compatible with popular mods like McMMO, making it an ideal choice for RPG enthusiasts.

Adventure/RPG.title: Armory
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds daggers, scythes, longswords, and various enchantments to Minecraft, enhancing players' combat capabilities with new one-of-a-kind melee options on the horizon. Enchantments expand character abilities beyond traditional swordsmanship. The mod's progression is ongoing, with more weapons and features still in development.

Adventure/RPG.title: Arsenal
Adventure/RPG.summary: Arsenal introduces a selection of high-quality, few-but-effective weapons to enhance gameplay. The Scythe stands out with its unique abilities, including reaping and stunning entities, disabling shields, and custom sound effects and particles. Additionally, the Scythe can be used as a Netherite-level hoe for efficient mining.

Adventure/RPG.title: Berserker (More RPG Classes)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Enter a wild battle trance as a Berserker! Adds powerful spells and combat mechanics, allowing players to cast bound spells from spell books or equipped weapons. Craft new axe-weapons and armor, and find them in chests for an immersive experience.

Adventure/RPG.title: BetterCombat x L_Ender 's Cataclysm
Adventure/RPG.summary: Enables full integration of Cataclysm mod's unique weapons with Better Combat's dynamic fighting mechanics, allowing players to customize attack ranges and weapon types with ease. Provides seamless compatibility between these two mods, enhancing gameplay experience. Includes customizable settings for each weapon, with notes for inexperienced users to ensure smooth modification.

Adventure/RPG.title: Just Mend It
Adventure/RPG.summary: Mending becomes an active experience management feature, allowing players to repair equipment in real-time using their current experience instead of earning it passively. The mod introduces a feedback sound and interactive repair mechanics via sneak + right-click with secondary cost in the offhand. Additionally, configuration options enable custom control over repair levels, costs, and limits.

Adventure/RPG.title: Blossom Blade
Adventure/RPG.summary: Generates a unique structure called Blossom Blade in the cherry grove biome, featuring an iron sword enchanted with Smite and Sharpness. The mod is compatible with various world-gen and biomes as long as vanilla cherry groves are maintained. It uses only vanilla blocks to integrate seamlessly into existing gameplay.

Adventure/RPG.title: Brainier Bees
Adventure/RPG.summary: Bee AI has been rewritten using Mojang's modern Brain system, ensuring more consistent and reliable behavior. Bees now effectively remember their homes and navigate through optimized pathing, eliminating issues like arbitrary flight from home or getting stuck in the sky. This mod addresses performance and stability concerns for servers.

Adventure/RPG.title: Bronze
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds a new set of materials and related items, including tin and bronze, with their own unique blocks, armor, and equipment to mix up gameplay. These materials introduce sidegrades to copper and iron, providing players with alternative gear options. The mod focuses on being vanilla-friendly, making it accessible for players who prefer minimal changes to the game's core mechanics.

Adventure/RPG.title: Repurposed Structures - Chef's Delight Compat
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds Chefs and Cooks to all RS villages except Ocean village, including Crimson and Warped Villages, allowing players to start cooking with access to a variety of new job sites and trades. This mod is compatible with Chef's Delight, a popular mod that expands on villager professions and trades. By integrating with Farmer's Delight Refabricated, Repurposed Structures - Chef's Delight Compat provides a comprehensive culinary experience in the game.

Adventure/RPG.title: Combat Roll
Adventure/RPG.summary: Rolls into combat by pressing `R`, dodging attacks and traversing terrain with 4-second cooldown, exhaust, and customizable distance. Invulnerability frames are also available, configurable through server settings. Customizable attributes like roll distance, recharge speed, and count allow for further player customization.

Adventure/RPG.title: Crawl
Adventure/RPG.description: [Modrinth Description]: The Crawl key is **Unbound** by default, You **have** to specify it.
Adventure/RPG.summary: [Modrinth Description]: The Crawl key is **Unbound** by default, You **have** to specify it.

Adventure/RPG.title: Cut Through
Adventure/RPG.summary: Cut Through enables seamless navigation through blocks and entities with its innovative "cutting" mechanic, reducing exploration time and simplifying resource gathering. The mod introduces a new dimension, allowing players to traverse the game world more efficiently. Its intuitive features enhance overall gameplay experience by streamlining movement and excavation processes.

Adventure/RPG.title: DragonLoot
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds a new crafting material obtained from killing the Ender Dragon, enabling players to craft unbreakable armor and an anvil with enhanced durability and defense properties. The mod includes two sets of dragon armor and an indestructible anvil that can be used without level caps or experience requirements. Developed for Fabric, this mod offers a unique twist on gameplay mechanics by leveraging the Ender Dragon's loot.

Adventure/RPG.title: Dungeon Difficulty
Adventure/RPG.summary: Location-based difficulty is introduced to Minecraft, allowing players to adjust the challenge level based on their current location. Difficulty settings can be customized by dimension, biome, or structure, with various types available such as Adventure and Dungeon modes. Loot items are also scaled up to match the location-specific difficulty, indicated by a "Power Level" in item tooltips.

Adventure/RPG.title: Durability Tweaks (RPG Tweaks)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Reduces equipment durability loss by introducing adjustable caps and multipliers for armor and shield wear, allowing players to fine-tune their gear's lifespan and survival strategy. The mod's configuration options provide granular control over durability loss rates, enabling a more personalized gameplay experience. By tweaking these settings, players can optimize their equipment usage and extend its effectiveness in the game world.

Adventure/RPG.title: Easy Magic
Adventure/RPG.summary: Easy Magic provides customizable magic menus, allowing players to easily access and manage their spellbook and potions. It also includes features like automatic potion brewing and stackable enchantments, simplifying gameplay and increasing productivity. Additionally, Easy Magic enables quick access to various magical resources, making it easier for players to explore and master the game's magical aspects.

Adventure/RPG.title: Elemental Wizards (More RPG Classes)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds three new Elemental Wizard subclasses: Earth, Water, and Wind, each with unique spells to enhance gameplay and combat experience. Players can master elemental magic to overcome challenges, making battles more engaging and immersive. These new classes expand the Wizards mod's RPG capabilities, offering diverse playstyles and strategic options.

Adventure/RPG.title: Elytra Trinket
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds Elytra to the cape slot in Trinkets API, allowing for convenient access and customization of these powerful wings. Compatible with various mods, including modded Elytra variants, making it a versatile addition to your Minecraft experience. Works alongside other mods like Elytra Slot, offering flexibility in your gameplay setup.

Adventure/RPG.title: Enchanted
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds enchantment text to your xp bar in place of the standard green bar, giving it a more magical and unique appearance. The text uses the Standard Galactic Alphabet, a fictional script that can be found in Minecraft's enchanting table. This mod brings an extra touch of magic to your gameplay experience.

Adventure/RPG.title: The Pixelmon Modpack
Adventure/RPG.summary: Pixelmon Modpack transforms Minecraft into a Pokémon experience, featuring a vast array of Pokémon to capture and battle with. The pack also includes an immersive soundtrack by Chris Geddes and features Journeymap for convenient navigation. With Oh The Biomes You'll Go, players can explore new biomes and adventure through the game world like never before.

Adventure/RPG.title: Exposure: Polaroid
Adventure/RPG.summary: Instant Camera allows players to quickly expose and print photographs on the spot, using Instant Slides that can be loaded into the camera. With a simplified interface and limited controls, this convenient alternative prioritizes instant results over advanced features, producing lower-resolution images but reducing development time to just 2 seconds. Up to 12 slides can be stored in the camera, offering a versatile solution for casual photographers.

Adventure/RPG.title: Fantastic Wings
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds a new dimension of flight to Minecraft, enabling players to craft and ride winged contraptions that grant them aerial abilities. These fantastic wings come in various shapes and sizes, each with unique properties and attributes, allowing for diverse exploration and combat experiences. Players can customize their flying gear with interchangeable components and accessories, further enhancing their in-game mobility.

Adventure/RPG.title: Forcemaster (More RPG Classes)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds a new Forcemaster class inspired by FLYFF's martial artist archetype, which uses "Knuckles" fist weapons and casts spells to enhance combat abilities. The mod includes custom spells and skills that can be unlocked through a Spell Book, enhancing gameplay with new strategies and playstyles. Requires the Spell Engine, More RPG Library, and Azure Lib Armor mods for proper functionality.

Adventure/RPG.title: Frostiful
Adventure/RPG.summary: Frostiful introduces numerous ways to freeze and resist cold temperatures in Minecraft, including passive freezing, icicles, and enchantments. Players can craft Fur Tufts to wear fur armor, providing Frost Resistance, or warm up by fires, Sun Lichen-covered rocks, or stealing heat from enemies with Enervation. The mod also reworks Powder Snow freezing mechanics and adds a new form of Illager magic called Frostology.

Adventure/RPG.title: Fusion
Adventure/RPG.summary: Fusion introduces steel and its items, as well as an alloy furnace called the fusion furnace. It also adds three new alloys - bronze, thyrium, and sinisite - along with their respective items. The mod includes a range of new tools and armors made from these metals.

Adventure/RPG.title: Gazebos (RPG Series)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Gazebos (RPG Series) introduces gazebos that can be found in villages, each housing a small spell library. Players can discover and explore these structures to access additional magical content.

Adventure/RPG.title: Gipples Galore
Adventure/RPG.summary: Gipples Galore introduces elusive Gipple mobs that dwell in rare cave colonies, which can be found under colder biomes and oceans. These creatures produce gelatin blocks, layers, and stones when fed glow lichen, and can multiply or produce edible gelatin depending on their feeding schedule. Players must carefully manage the Gipples' food supply to reap rewards, all while navigating the risks of rare but unpredictable events.

Adventure/RPG.title: Guarding
Adventure/RPG.summary: Parrying and Pummeling mechanics are introduced, allowing players to time blocks to deflect enemies and projectiles. Unique enchantments like Barbed apply thorns to shields, while the Netherite Shield offers increased durability and knockback resistance. Additionally, Instantaneous Blocking enables shields to block attacks more quickly.

Adventure/RPG.title: Hardcore Revival
Adventure/RPG.summary: Revives dead players in Multiplayer Hardcore worlds by building a ritual structure and placing a designated "sacrifice item" on top, allowing for rebirth with customizable settings. The mod also includes operator-configurable options to modify the revival process, including disabling player range requirements and explosions. A base configuration sets the default sacrifice item to an Ender Pearl, but can be changed through in-game commands.

Adventure/RPG.title: nObUfFoNlYSwIM
Adventure/RPG.summary: Mounted horses can now swim through water without sinking, and the player will no longer be thrown off. The debug overlay provides detailed stats about your horse, including a 3D display of its abilities within a 64-block radius. A customizable keybinding toggles this feature for easy access to your horse's information.

Adventure/RPG.title: Soulified IllagerInvasion
Adventure/RPG.summary: Enhances 11 elite illager variants with Tier 2-3 buffs, increasing raid difficulty to late-game levels, perfect for players seeking an added challenge. This mod is designed for use with Illager Invasion and requires Soulified Vanilla or a compatible datapack/mod to function. It introduces formidable enemies that will test even the most skilled adventurers.

Adventure/RPG.title: Jarjarbinks
