Adventure/RPG.summary: Could not find mod online. Please check the filename or search manually.

Adventure/RPG.title: Jewelry (RPG Series)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds precious gems to be discovered and crafted into powerful jewelry, offering unique gameplay mechanics and RPG elements to enrich your Minecraft experience. Jewelry (RPG Series) introduces a new layer of depth with craftable and wearable items that grant bonuses and abilities, elevating character progression and customization. This mod requires Spell Power Attributes and Ranged Weapon API for its functionality, making it a great fit for players looking to enhance their RPG experience.

Adventure/RPG.title: Dungeons Enhanced Lootintegration Addon
Adventure/RPG.summary: No description available.

Adventure/RPG.title: Graves
Adventure/RPG.summary: Graves provides an innovative feature where players can recover their loot from graves that generate at Y = 1 in the End's void. Additionally, graves submerged under lava rise to its surface, offering a convenient way to reclaim lost items. The mod also offers administrative options for configuring various settings through commands.

Adventure/RPG.title: More Axolotl Variants Mod
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds 9 additional axolotl variants to vanilla Minecraft, including Skulk Axolotl and Glowxolotl, which can be obtained through breeding. These new variants have their own NBT tags, allowing for unique customization options. A summon command is also available to spawn specific variants at a specified location.

Adventure/RPG.title: Mob Control
Adventure/RPG.summary: Mob Control allows modpack designers to create and customize mobs through a simple human-readable config. It introduces a powerful rule-base system that enables control over mob spawning, AI, and behavior, including customizable loot drops, abilities, and damage output. With Mob Control, players have total control to tailor the survival experience and make encounters more intense and strategic.

Adventure/RPG.title: More Armor Trims
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds ten new armor trims to Minecraft, each with unique crafting methods and drop rates that provide an exciting challenge to obtain. These rare trims can be crafted into armor using smithing templates, offering a fresh way to customize your character's appearance. Each trim has its own specific method of acquisition, adding variety to the game's exploration and gameplay mechanics.

Adventure/RPG.title: More Bows and Arrows
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds a wide variety of bows and arrows with new abilities, more damage, and exciting gameplay mechanics. Six new enchantments are introduced, offering features like faster bow loading and multi-arrow shooting capabilities. This mod enhances the game's archery experience while maintaining a vanilla-like feel.

Adventure/RPG.title: MoreTotems
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds improved functionality to Totems of Undying, allowing for more convenient gameplay and increased survival chances in Minecraft. This mod enhances the existing totem system, providing a subtle yet impactful addition to the game's mechanics. It is designed specifically for use with Paper servers.

Adventure/RPG.title: More Villagers: Re-employed
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds brand new professions and workstations to villagers in vanilla Minecraft, including unique trades and additional advancements, while also allowing users to create custom villager professions through a user-friendly interface. The mod introduces Badlands Villagers that spawn in specific biomes, offering a fresh gameplay experience. Players can now interact with these new villagers and access exclusive recipes and tools.

Adventure/RPG.title: MusketMod x Better Combat
Adventure/RPG.description: [Modrinth Description]: This datapack lets you use the Musket With Bayonet properly when playing with the "better combat" mod. It uses the same behavior of the trident.
Adventure/RPG.summary: [Modrinth Description]: This datapack lets you use the Musket With Bayonet properly when playing with the "better combat" mod. It uses the same behavior of the trident.

Adventure/RPG.title: The Aether, Twilight Forest and MutantMonsters - Legacy Crafting
Adventure/RPG.summary: Legacy Crafting integrates Twilight Forest, Mutant Creatures, and The Aether into the Legacy4J crafting system, allowing for streamlined access to their content. Defeat mutated mobs like the Hulk Zombie and Mutant Enderman to obtain unique rewards and powerful items. Tame explosive minions and craft legendary gear in a world where survival is not guaranteed.

Adventure/RPG.title: Nether Depths Upgrade
Adventure/RPG.summary: No description available.

Adventure/RPG.title: Nyf's Spiders
Adventure/RPG.summary: Regular spiders and cave spiders now climb walls and ceilings, improving their navigation around obstacles, and enhancing overall creepiness in vanilla Minecraft gameplay. Their AI has also been upgraded to better navigate complex environments. With Nyf's Spiders 2.0, the game world becomes even more immersive and menacing.

Adventure/RPG.title: Ore Creeper
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds creepers based on various ores that transform into those ores when they explode, offering a unique way to obtain rare materials while exploring. Creepers no longer deal damage and can be killed for loot, with customizable spawn rates and explosion sizes via the config file. Compatible with Squishy's Reanimated Mobs resource pack.

Adventure/RPG.title: Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Paladins & Priests (RPG Series) introduces RPG-style combat skill sets and classes, enabling players to specialize in healing, protection, or offense. This mod integrates with existing mods like Spell Engine, AzureLib Armor, and Runes to enhance gameplay mechanics and character development. It also supports multi-classing, allowing players to combine different skills and abilities for a unique playstyle.

Adventure/RPG.title: Passive Shield
Adventure/RPG.summary: Passive Shield modifies shield mechanics by disabling offhand rendering when not in use and reintroducing it upon right-click activation. Players can now configure shield behavior to suit their playstyle. This mod enhances gameplay by optimizing visual performance and player convenience.

Adventure/RPG.title: Persistent Parrots
Adventure/RPG.summary: Parrots now stay perched on your shoulder while exploring, allowing for consistent companionship without worrying about losing them in perilous situations. You can make them hop off with sneak and jump, and they'll only be resistant to splashing or damage under specific conditions. The mod is server-side, so only the server needs it, making it easy to share with others.

Adventure/RPG.title: PetProtect
Adventure/RPG.summary: Protects tamed mobs from PvP by disabling player damage and attacks, allowing owners to care for their pets without fear of harm in combat modes. The mod also includes configuration options for customizing pet behavior, including settings for owner interactions and creative mode exemptions. These features work together to create a safe environment for players to nurture and interact with their tamed companions.

Adventure/RPG.title: Arcwise - Puffish Skill Tree (puffish_attributes-0.7.7-1.21-fabric.jar)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Arcwise introduces a Pufferfish Skills & Attributes-based system, offering customizable skill trees and functions to enhance gameplay experience. Players can earn XP by killing entities, unlocking skills that boost attack speed, knockback, melee damage, ranged damage resistance, and more. The mod supports various versions, including 1.18.2-1.21.4 + Forge.

Adventure/RPG.title: RPG Skills
Adventure/RPG.summary: Introduces a dependency-heavy skill tree to Minecraft, enhancing gameplay with a complex system of character progression and development through RPG-style skills. This mod integrates seamlessly with other mods from ZsoltMolnarrr, allowing for a rich and immersive experience. Players can customize their characters by allocating points to various skills, unlocking new abilities and enhancing existing ones.

Adventure/RPG.title: Quest Items
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds miscellaneous items and fluids to support quest objectives in Minecraft. These items can be spawned in Creative mode only and are designed for use with other quest mods or NPCs. Includes 15 unique items, 3 fluids, and 2 blocks that simulate various game elements without altering normal gameplay.

Adventure/RPG.title: Relics
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds dozens of unique items with complex mechanics, allowing players to combine relics in countless ways to unlock their true potential. The mod's leveling system and random stats ensure each relic is distinct, generating virtually unlimited combinations of sets. This results in a long-lasting experience that keeps gameplay fresh for an extended period.

Adventure/RPG.title: Ribbits
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds swamp villages inhabited by tiny frog villagers called ribbits, which can be traded with and interacted with in various ways. Ribbits come in different professions, including merchant, fisherman, sorcerer, and gardener, each providing unique benefits and interactions. They also have a natural behavior to return home at night, but their home point can be reset with amethyst.

Adventure/RPG.title: Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds RPG-style combat skill sets, also known as classes, to enhance gameplay and provide players with unique abilities. Introduces martial skills such as silent blades and mighty blows, allowing players to dominate in battle. Combines with other mods like AzureLib Armor and Spell Engine for a comprehensive gaming experience.

Adventure/RPG.title: Rolling Down in the Deep
Adventure/RPG.summary: Rolling Down in the Deep introduces full pitch, yaw, and roll control while swimming underwater, transforming the experience into a more immersive and satisfying one. The mod's controls allow for precise navigation, with customizable keys and settings to tailor gameplay to individual preferences. With Rolling Down in the Deep, players can explore the depths of Minecraft with greater freedom and fluidity.

Adventure/RPG.title: Runes
Adventure/RPG.summary: Runes enables players to craft and utilize various magical items by combining ingredients relevant to each rune's properties, such as Arcane Amethyst or Coal for Fire runes, at a Rune Crafting Altar or in hand. This mod introduces new crafting recipes and mechanics, allowing players to access more powerful magical abilities with increased efficiency. Runes adds a new layer of depth to the game's magic system, providing additional options for players to explore and master.

Adventure/RPG.title: Sculk Expansion
Adventure/RPG.summary: Expands sculk and warden gameplay by allowing wardens to spread sculk as they move, and adds climbable sculk veins and blocks that burn with soul fire when lit. The Recovery Compass now emits soul particles pointing towards nearby mobs or players, while the mod also introduces new recipes for converting between sculk blocks and veins. This datapack enhances exploration and building possibilities within Minecraft's depths.

Adventure/RPG.title: Simply More
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds 10 new weapon types and 33 unique weapons to Simply Swords, including Great Katanas, Grandswords with shield-disabling abilities, and Lances that gain strength while mounted. Unique weapons bring fresh playstyles and customization options to the game, expanding the combat possibilities. Compatible with various mods for additional features and customization.

Adventure/RPG.title: Epic_Fight_X_SimplySwords
Adventure/RPG.summary: Enables MythicMetals compatibility for SimplySwords, allowing Forge users to access new weapon variants from various ore types when using the Connector mod with MM. This feature was previously missing from the published SimplySwords jar, but is now accessible through Epic_Fight_X_SimplySwords.

Adventure/RPG.title: Skill Tree (RPG Series)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds a vast skill tree system with 100+ unique nodes, allowing RPG Series classes to specialize in offensive or defensive directions. Players can earn skill points by gathering XP, unlocking new abilities and modifying existing spells for stronger combinations. This mod offers meaningful choices and depth to the gameplay experience, providing a more nuanced and rewarding progression path.

Adventure/RPG.title: Snowrealmagic

Adventure/RPG.title: Snuffles
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds fluffy mobs with unique frosty fur and big tongues that can be bred with potatoes and harvested for their fluff. These Snuffles can change between warm and frosty states based on environmental conditions and have distinct hairstyles that can be cycled through using Slimeballs. They also leave trails of snowflakes wherever they go, making them a charming addition to snowy biomes.

Adventure/RPG.title: SpawnersPlus
Adventure/RPG.summary: Minecraft players gain full control over mob spawners with SpawnersPlus, allowing them to mine and manipulate spawners in various ways. The mod enables players to change a spawner's mob type using a spawn egg and even move spawners around by picking them up as items. This flexibility extends to configuration options for the server administrator, making it easy to tailor gameplay to suit their needs.

Adventure/RPG.title: Speaking Villagers - ChatGPT and TTS
Adventure/RPG.summary: Speaking Villagers introduces AI-generated conversations, friendships, and dynamic quests to Minecraft's villager interactions. Each villager is assigned one of 8,000+ distinct personalities, making every interaction feel unique. The mod now includes player speech recognition, allowing direct voice input with your microphone and a range of customizable voices.

Adventure/RPG.title: Spell Engine
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds a comprehensive spellcasting system to Minecraft, enabling players to craft and master magical abilities through a robust skill tree and attribute-based character progression. The mod provides essential features for fantasy roleplaying, including spell casting, animation support, and equipment customization, which can be further expanded upon with additional mods.

Adventure/RPG.title: Spell Power Attributes
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds Entity Attributes for magical abilities, introducing six schools of magic: Arcane, Fire, Frost, Healing, Lightning, and Soul. These attributes enable queries on spell damage, critical strike chance, and multiplier, with critical striking based on secondary attributes. The mod provides a native Minecraft experience inspired by Warcraft's magic school system.

Adventure/RPG.title: Spooky Doors
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds a spooky twist to vanilla doors in Minecraft, allowing players to peek through them by dragging their mouse, slam them shut with a quick drag, and run into ajar doors to open or close them, accompanied by eerie creaking sounds. Automatic conversion of vanilla doors eliminates the need for manual replacement. Players can also take advantage of scheduled detection cycles and range scanning features for seamless integration.

Adventure/RPG.title: Stalker Creepers Fabric
Adventure/RPG.summary: Creeper behavior changes to make them stalk players, following and waiting for eye contact before exploding. This mod introduces a new layer of tension to gameplay, requiring cautious observation when exploring or fighting against mobs. Requires Fabric API for functionality.

Adventure/RPG.title: Substrate
Adventure/RPG.summary: Substrate introduces a new dimension to Minecraft, providing players with an alternative world to explore and build in. This mod also includes optimized block rendering, making it compatible with Sodium (or Embeddium) for improved performance. The Substrate dimension features unique terrain generation and gameplay mechanics.

Adventure/RPG.title: Supplementaries
Adventure/RPG.summary: Supplementaries provides functional and aesthetically pleasing content to fill gaps in vanilla Minecraft, enhancing gameplay with various features and tools. It is highly configurable and designed to be complementary to existing content. This Forge mod requires Moonlight Library and offers a wide range of new possibilities for Vanilla+ players.

Adventure/RPG.title: Tax Free Levels
Adventure/RPG.summary: No description available.

Adventure/RPG.title: Craft Trident
Adventure/RPG.summary: Crafts Trident using a custom recipe, allowing players to forge their own legendary Tridents without needing to hunt Drowned mobs for hours. Requires 3 Quartz and 2 Prismarine Shards or Crystals as ingredients, which can be crafted in a standard Crafting Table. This mod enables players to choose what features they want in their world, making the Trident accessible for everyone.

Adventure/RPG.title: Unknown5473lib
Adventure/RPG.summary: Adds particle effect templates and visual effects like screen shake to enhance gameplay visuals. Provides boss mob and skill templates, including laser skills in development. A library mod that supports other mods by offering essential code components.

Adventure/RPG.title: B's VoidTotem
Adventure/RPG.summary: Prevents players from dying in the void by launching them upwards with levitation and slowing their descent when they fall into an abyss, saving them from fatal falls. This mod is designed for use on JDK 21 PaperMC servers and can be used to prevent accidental deaths while building or exploring. With the Void Totem, players can safely fall from any height without suffering damage.

Adventure/RPG.title: Witcher (More RPG Classes)
Adventure/RPG.summary: Slay monsters like a Witcher with the addition of many battle mechanics inspired by the Witcher Universe, including spells and signs that can be unlocked through a Spell Book and equipped to enhance combat. This mod brings a fresh RPG experience to Minecraft, with new abilities and tactics to master. Equipping a Spell Book unlocks powerful spells, transforming gameplay into a thrilling adventure.

Adventure/RPG.title: Withering Heights: Revamped Wither
Adventure/RPG.summary: Increases the Wither's health and armor to 600 points and 20 armor, respectively, while introducing new attacks that players can learn and adapt to in a more challenging fight. The mod features two phases of combat with five unique attacks, including explosive moves and stuns, and allows players to craft a new Nether Star-based weapon. Additionally, the Wither now plays boss music when spawned and has a dynamic death animation.

Adventure/RPG.title: Yungs Better End Island
Adventure/RPG.summary: Redesigns the End Island, revamping its structure and dragon summoning mechanics. The dragon now spawns from the bell tower when approached, and crystals are placed within to resummon it. Compatibility is optimized with other mods, including Endergetic Expansion and Progressive Bosses.

Library/API.title: Almanac
Library/API.summary: Almanac provides shared code between multiple mods to reduce duplication and optimize performance. It also fixes an issue with empty tags, allowing non-stackable items to be handled correctly in game. By improving mod efficiency, Almanac enhances gameplay stability and consistency.

Library/API.title: Anvian's Lib
Library/API.summary: Anvian's Lib provides various helpful functions for mod developers to streamline their projects and offers telemetry capabilities to track player usage. The library can be easily integrated into mods using configuration files or build.gradle scripts. By implementing Anvian's Lib, modders can focus on creating new content without worrying about tedious tasks and gain insights into their project's popularity.

Library/API.title: Architectury API
Library/API.summary: Architectury API simplifies developing multiplatform mods by abstracting calls to Fabric and Forge APIs, reducing boilerplate code and making it easier to create cross-compatible mods. This intermediary API currently features over 90 event hooks, networking abstraction, and an easy-to-use @ExpectPlatform annotation for static methods. By leveraging Architectury API, modders can focus on creating complex multiplatform mods with minimal effort.

Library/API.title: AzureLib
Library/API.summary: Adds advanced animation capabilities to Minecraft mods through 3D keyframe-driven animations, over 30 easing functions, and concurrent animation support. AzureLib also features sound and particle keyframes, event-based keyframes, and other functionalities for intricate mod animations. It's built on top of Geckolib 4.x and serves as a dedicated animation engine for Minecraft mods.

Library/API.title: AzureLib Armor
Library/API.summary: Adds GeoArmor and GeoItem functions to Minecraft, allowing developers to create animated armor without requiring the full AzureLib mod. This library is compatible with various Minecraft versions, including Forge, NeoForge, and Fabric. It provides a stripped-down version of AzureLib's armor creation steps for easy integration into other mods.

Library/API.title: Balm
Library/API.summary: Balm simplifies multi-loader mods by providing common interfaces and events, removing the need for most mod-loader specific code. It supports various loaders like NeoForge, Fabric, and Forge without duplicate code, making it a useful tool for mod developers. This library mod is essential for users of mods that require Balm to function properly.

Library/API.title: Cardinal Components API
Library/API.summary: Attaches data to vanilla classes and allows for easy plugin integration, while also providing features such as automatic saving of modded data and synchronization with a single helper interface. Implements components that can be ticked alongside their target and provides customization options for component copying when players respawn. Utilizes ASM-generated extensions for blazing speed and performance.

Library/API.title: CICADA
Library/API.summary: CICADA enhances gameplay with player rendering independent of world context and a custom cloak renderer, while also providing an API for inter-mod conversations in the game log and advanced logging features. It offers tools for mod developers, including a self-managed config template class and an abstract mixin plugin for compatibility mixins. This library mod streamlines mod development and enhances gameplay with its versatile set of utilities and abstractions.

Library/API.title: Cloth Config API
Library/API.summary: Enables developers to create customizable config screens for their mods, providing users with a seamless and intuitive experience when adjusting settings. Offers a simple and easy-to-use API for creating dynamic and flexible configuration interfaces. Enhances modding capabilities by streamlining the process of implementing user-configurable options.

Library/API.title: Collective
Library/API.summary: Collective provides a shared library of common code for all of Serilum's mods, centralizing data and functions in one place to simplify maintenance across multiple mod loader versions. The mod streamlines updates by allowing changes to be made once, affecting related projects simultaneously. This unified approach reduces development time and enables more efficient feature implementation.

Library/API.title: CorgiLib
Library/API.summary: CorgiLib provides essential features for modders, including `.json5` Config Serialization and commented codecs for easier config management. It also offers advanced features such as Trees from NBT and Entity Filters, allowing for more complex interactions within the game world. Additionally, Blending/Easing Functions codec registry simplifies codec serialization, making configuration setup more efficient.

Library/API.title: CoroUtil
Library/API.summary: CoroUtil consolidates essential code from multiple mods into one comprehensive package, providing tools for customization and advanced rendering capabilities to enhance gameplay and immersion in Minecraft. It combines four key components: CoroAI, BuildMod, ConfigMod, and ExtendedRenderer, streamlining access to core functionalities. This modpack staple empowers users with unparalleled flexibility and control over their Minecraft experience.

Library/API.title: Cristel Lib
Library/API.summary: Customize structure generation and adjust world generation through code or data with Cristel Lib's flexible framework. Create, manage, and override structure configs for supported mods to fit your personal playstyle. Easily link configs to specific mods using a simple format, giving you full control over structure behavior in-game.

Library/API.title: EpheroLib
Library/API.summary: EpheroLib abstracts code between fabric and forge, enabling common config systems through configurate, network packet abstraction, and server-side translations using GSON for localization. It also provides a GSON-based storage abstraction for storing data per world, simplifying mod development. This modular framework streamlines modding by eliminating compatibility issues and promoting efficient, multi-platform development.

Library/API.title: Fabric API
Library/API.summary: Provides essential hooks and APIs for interoperability between mods, exposing useful but hard-to-access features like particles and biomes, with an advanced rendering API for optimized graphics. Enables registry synchronization and adds information to crash reports for improved stability. Offers a modular and lightweight library for faster mod development and game optimization.

Library/API.title: Fabric Language Kotlin
Library/API.summary: Enables usage of Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods, providing a dependency for other mods to ensure compatibility across various Minecraft versions. Modders can utilize its features through the provided documentation on GitHub. This mod does not add content itself but rather serves as a foundation for other modifications.

Library/API.title: Fabric Yaml Configuration
Library/API.summary: Fabric Yaml Configuration allows mods to use yaml configuration files, enabling customizable and dynamic settings through simple file updates. It provides methods for setting configuration paths, default configurations, initialization, saving, and reloading configurations. This mod simplifies configuration management for developers, making it easier to create complex, user-configurable mods.

Library/API.title: Faewulf's Lib
Library/API.summary: Faewulf's Lib provides utility functions and methods commonly used across Faewulf's mods, streamlining gameplay with essential tools. The mod relies on the Fabric API to function, making it a core component for fabric-modded servers. By using this library, players can tap into Faewulf's extensive range of features and enhance their Minecraft experience.

Library/API.title: Konkrete
Library/API.summary: Adds a suite of essential APIs and classes for other mods to leverage in customizing Minecraft gameplay, enabling the creation of complex features without modifying the game's core code. Konkrete serves as a foundation for integrating various functionalities, including Open Imaging, JsonPath, and Json-smart libraries. By utilizing Konkrete's infrastructure, mod developers can craft richer experiences for players.

Library/API.title: MaLiLib
Library/API.summary: MaLiLib provides a shared codebase and utility classes for client-side mods, including configuration options, keybind systems, and GUI components. It serves as the foundation for numerous mods developed by masa and other authors. By standardizing common functionality, MaLiLib streamlines mod development and enhances gameplay experiences.

Library/API.title: More Axolotl Variants API
Library/API.summary: Adds Axolotl variant support to other mods through a lightweight API, enabling seamless coexistence and custom variants without conflicts. Provides a customizable Axolotl Bucket Item model feature for modded variants. Appends informative tooltips to Axolotl Buckets displaying age, variant, and mod information.

Library/API.title: Melody
Library/API.summary: Melody introduces an OpenAL-based client-side library for playing background music in Minecraft. It allows asynchronous loading of audio files from various sources and supports OGG and WAV formats, with potential extension to other file types. This mod enables easy music playback in menus or in-game environments, ideal for creating immersive experiences.

Library/API.title: MidnightLib
Library/API.summary: MidnightLib provides a lightweight library of common utilities and a configuration system for mods, allowing developers to bundle it with their projects via Jar-in-Jar. The mod offers a customizable config screen/file, where every feature can be toggled as needed. This flexible framework enables mod creators to focus on gameplay mechanics without worrying about redundant code or configurations.

Library/API.title: ModMenu Badges Lib
Library/API.summary: Adds customizable badges to ModMenu through a simple library interface. This mod enables users to create and display their own unique badges within the game's menu system. Suitable for mods looking to add personalized flair or identify specific features without modifying core code.

Library/API.title: ModMenu Badges Lib (modmenu-badges-lib-2023.6.1.jar)
Library/API.summary: Adds customizable badges to ModMenu, enabling users to showcase additional information about their mods or projects in-game. This library simplifies badge creation and management, allowing mod developers to focus on building and sharing their content without worrying about custom badge implementation. Easy integration via Gradle dependencies makes it a seamless addition to any project.

Library/API.title: Modopedia
Library/API.summary: Customizable in-game documentation and resource guides are provided by Modopedia, featuring an extensive API and versatile content creation options. Key features include custom textures, quick item lookup, and improved JSON formatting for mod developers' flexibility and efficiency. A range of templates and error handling capabilities enhance the overall user experience.

Library/API.title: MonoLib
Library/API.summary: MonoLib provides a cornerstone library of reusable code for mods, reducing repetition and increasing efficiency in mod development. It offers utility functions for event callbacks, commands, registration binding, and more, drawing similarities to other popular mod libraries like Botania and Collective. Compatible with Minecraft versions 1.20.1-1.21.5.

Library/API.title: Moog's Structure Lib (moogs_structures)
Library/API.summary: Adds a powerful library mod that provides flexible structure generation systems for other mods to build upon, allowing developers to create complex and dynamic structures with ease. Provides data-driven placement systems and various structure types, including a complete barn example, making it an essential tool for mod developers. Works across Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge platforms, and can be installed server-side only.

Library/API.title: Moogs Structure Lib
Library/API.summary: No description available.

Library/API.title: Moonlight Lib
Library/API.summary: Moonlight Lib offers dynamic resource pack utilities, block set registration, custom map markers, dynamic villager AI, and tools for custom first and third person animations, enhancing gameplay with versatile customization options. It also includes a grindstone achievement trigger system to reward players' progress. This comprehensive library empowers modders to create more immersive experiences by providing a range of dynamic features and utilities.

Library/API.title: More RPG Library
Library/API.summary: Enables the creation of RPG classes by providing unique EntityAttributes and Status Effects that can be used across multiple mods, serving as a library for various class-based content mods. Adds no spells on its own, requiring users to install corresponding class mods for functionality. This mod is an essential component of the More RPG Classes & Content Series Mods.

Library/API.title: Necronomicon API
Library/API.summary: Empowers modders with a utility API featuring tools for datagen, worldgen, registries, and multi-loader development, as well as a custom config system. Provides essential utilities for streamlining mod creation and enhancing gameplay experiences. Integrates seamlessly with Fabric and Forge, making it an indispensable asset for Minecraft modding projects.

Library/API.title: OctoLib
Library/API.summary: OctoLib provides a shared codebase for OctoStudios' mods, featuring a YAML-based config with auto-validation and deep serialization. This mod also requires ArchitecturyAPI to function properly, starting from version 1.20.1. By using OctoLib, developers can leverage its robust safety features in their projects.

Library/API.title: oωo (owo-lib)
Library/API.summary: Adds a powerful utility library for Minecraft modding on Fabric and Quilt, featuring a declarative UI builder, customizable config system, automatic registration, item group extensions, and a robust networking layer with client-sided particle helpers and rich text translations. Enhances mod development with streamlined tools for building complex interfaces, managing configurations, and creating dynamic screens. Supports seamless server-client synchronization and compatibility across various Minecraft versions.

Library/API.title: Text Placeholder API
Library/API.summary: Enables users to create and parse placeholders in strings and Text Components, improving mod compatibility and user experience. Simplified formatting options allow for easy styling of placeholders without manual JSON configuration. Developers can leverage this API to achieve seamless mod integration and customizable user interfaces.

Library/API.title: Player Animation Library
Library/API.summary: Enables mods to animate the player seamlessly, allowing for customizable animations loaded from Blender and Blockbench JSON files, as well as advanced molang support and keyframe control over effects and particle systems. Adds custom pivot points and bones, enabling precise animation manipulation. Streamlines mod development with its robust animation tools and flexible formatting options.

Library/API.title: Polymer Patch Bundle
Library/API.summary: Patches multiple mods to run fully server-side with all original features intact, ensuring seamless gameplay and functionality on multiplayer servers. Requires installation of the original mods and a custom resource pack for optimal performance.

Library/API.title: Prickle
Library/API.summary: Prickle introduces a JSON-based config format with added features like comments and decorators, ensuring seamless integration with Minecraft's existing datapack and command systems. This mod brings 100% backwards compatibility with JSON while offering improvements over traditional JSON formats. Prickle also supports default values, making it a more intuitive and user-friendly option for players.

Library/API.title: Prism
Library/API.summary: Adds a powerful set of utilities for easily adding color-related functionality to mods, including animated colors, web colors, and HSV manipulation. Enables mod developers to enhance Minecraft's built-in TextColor with additional features and capabilities. Supports advanced color functionality without requiring extensive coding or modifications.

Library/API.title: Ranged Weapon API
Library/API.summary: Bows and crossbows are streamlined for development through customizable properties, automatic model registration, and correct rendering features. Customizable weapon properties allow developers to fine-tune damage, pull time, and projectile velocity. Easy creation of complex ranged weapons is enabled with this mod's API.

Library/API.title: Resourceful Config
Library/API.summary: Resourceful Config provides an intuitive configuration system for Minecraft mods on various platforms, including Forge and Fabric. It allows for hot reloading of configurations using the official Forge config system or JSONC, depending on the platform. Additionally, it features a user-friendly interface for configuring settings and a web interface for servers or clients to access configuration options.

Library/API.title: Resourceful Lib
Library/API.summary: Resourceful Lib provides a comprehensive collection of utilities and APIs that expand Minecraft's capabilities, including a GL Scissor API, Stateful and History Screen Manager, Codecs, Color API, Cross Platform Networking, and more. This modding library offers essential tools for developers to enhance gameplay, providing features like scheduling, web utilities, and compressed binary formatting (YABN). With its extensive range of APIs and utilities, Resourceful Lib is a crucial component for Minecraft mods that seek to deliver innovative experiences.

Library/API.title: Shield API
Library/API.summary: Enables mod authors to easily create shields with custom models. Shields can now be designed and implemented with greater flexibility and creativity. Simplifies shield creation for mod developers.

Library/API.title: StateObserver
Library/API.summary: Observes blockstate changes across large areas without significant performance impact, making it a valuable tool for developers to enhance their mod creations. This lightweight library helps optimize game performance while still allowing for detailed tracking of block state changes. It's designed specifically for use by developers, adding advanced functionality to their custom mods and projects.

Library/API.title: Structure Pool API
Library/API.summary: Injects custom structures into structure pools, allowing players to add unique village layouts and maximize spawn counts of specific structures. Popularly used for adding custom village structures to villages, with features including maximizing spawn count of injected structures. Enhances gameplay by providing a flexible way to customize the game world.

Library/API.title: TCDCommons API
Library/API.summary: Adds a user-friendly GUI system and various events and hooks to optimize mod development, eliminating redundant code and enhancing productivity. The API also includes auto-config system, event handling, and HUD rendering capabilities for visual enhancement. These features are designed to streamline mod creation and enhance gameplay with customizable visuals and automated configuration management.

Library/API.title: TerraBlender
Library/API.summary: Adds biomes in a simple and compatible manner to Minecraft's new biome/terrain system. TerraBlender provides a library mod that allows developers to add custom biomes with ease, enhancing game worlds with diverse environments. Available for Forge, NeoForge, and Fabric, making it accessible across various mod loaders.

Library/API.title: Thermoo
Library/API.summary: Temperature and environment management is made easy with Thermoo's unified framework for temperature and wetness, powerful datapack-based Environment API, and robust API for unit-agnostic temperature records. This mod provides a foundation for mods like Frostiful or Scorchful to build upon, ensuring seamless compatibility between temperature-dependent mechanics. By utilizing Thermoo, developers can create more realistic and immersive environmental effects in Minecraft.

Library/API.title: Thermoo Patches
Library/API.summary: Thermoo Patches brings compatibility patches and integrations to Thermoo-based mods, enhancing their gameplay experience with added features like temperature display on the HUD. The mod also includes planned patches for other non-Thermoo mods where Thermoo integration would be beneficial. For example, Armor Points++ now displays temperature percentages next to health text when paired with libhud.

Library/API.title: TxniLib
Library/API.summary: A library mod designed to streamline development across multiple versions and platforms, providing platform- and version-specific implementations to simplify maintenance of projects on Forge and Fabric. It supports simultaneous release of mods on 1.20 & 1.21 from a single codebase using the accompanying multiversion template mod. Developers can leverage this library's functionality to reduce repetitive if/else statements when working across different versions.

Library/API.title: Villager API
Library/API.summary: Adds a data-driven framework to create custom villager professions, types, and trades through JSON files without coding or complex setup. Customization options include workstations, trading pools, item components, treasure maps, biome appearances, and biome-specific trades. This mod is designed for pack makers and modders who want to add villager content without dealing with Java code.

Library/API.title: VoiceChat Interaction
Library/API.summary: Adds player voice chat reactivity to Sculk sensors and the Warden, configurable through an auto-generated `config.yml` file. This allows for customizable voice triggers in group, whisper, and sneak modes, with adjustable decibel thresholds and cooldowns. Players can also toggle and reload settings using the `/voicechat_interaction` command.

Library/API.title: YUNG's API
Library/API.summary: YUNG's API offers a range of useful features and utilities for mod developers, particularly those working on worldgen mods. Key additions include an AutoRegistration system, a custom Jigsaw Manager with improved performance, and new criteria triggers for safely locating structures. The API also provides interfaces for JSON serialization and deserialization, as well as simple math utilities for vectors and column positions.

Performance.title: Alternate Current
Performance.summary: Alternate Current optimizes redstone dust efficiency by predicting and reducing unnecessary updates and calculations in large networks, resulting in up to 30 times lower MSPT contributions compared to Vanilla redstone. This mod fixes lag issues caused by recursive power level updates, allowing for more intuitive network layouts with fewer redundant updates.

Performance.title: Athena
Performance.summary: Athena introduces built-in support for connected textures and unique baked models to optimize performance and compatibility across platforms. Its connected texture method minimizes unnecessary calculations and resolves common issues, while also allowing for custom checks to enhance functionality. This versatile loader enables seamless interaction with a variety of blocks and items.

Performance.title: BadOptimizations
Performance.summary: Avoids unnecessary lightmap updates and optimizes sky color calculation by caching results when surroundings are static. Reduces debug logic processing to only when data is available from the server. Can improve frame rates, potentially boosting performance on low-end systems or in heavily modded environments.

Performance.title: Connectored C2ME (C2ME fork for connector) (C3ME)
Performance.summary: Improves chunk performance by utilizing multiple CPU cores in parallel, reducing lag and increasing scalability during world generation and loading. Compatible with Sinytra Connector, but may require Lithium and Starlight for optimal results. Currently in alpha stage, use at your own risk.

Performance.title: Clumps
Performance.summary: Groups XP orbs together to reduce lag and makes them automatically collectible when touching the player, eliminating clutter in small areas. Required on server side for 1.17 or newer versions, and on both client and server sides for older Minecraft versions. This mod streamlines player experience by reducing lag and increasing convenience during exploration.

Performance.title: Distant Horizons
Performance.summary: Adds simplified terrain past Minecraft's default view distance to improve performance and allow for longer draw distances. This enables players to explore vast landscapes without performance issues, making it ideal for building structures in remote areas. The mod is designed to work seamlessly with certain shaders, including Optifine and Iris, and supports multiplayer gameplay.

Performance.title: Dynamic FPS
Performance.summary: Dynamic FPS adjusts Minecraft's performance based on its activity level and environment, reducing resource usage while idle or in battery mode. It allows you to customize frame rates, volume, and toast notifications for various states, including when the game is minimized, unfocused, or obscured by overlays. The mod also fixes a vanilla bug causing excessive background CPU usage and optimizes performance on low-end systems.

Performance.title: EntityCulling 1.8.9 port
Performance.summary: EntityCulling optimizes client-side performance by skipping the rendering of hidden entities, reducing FPS loss in areas with many occluded blocks. It uses OpenGL culling (with a frame delay) or raytraced culling (more CPU-intensive) depending on hardware capabilities. Compatible with 1.8.9 versions only.

Performance.title: Fabric RE-Forged
Performance.summary: Adds performance optimizations and quality of life features to enhance gameplay, along with enhanced visuals, combat mechanics, and improved biome generation. Also includes various mods that expand upon existing Minecraft features, creating a fresh and immersive experience. Compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1.

Performance.title: Faster Random
Performance.summary: Rewrites Minecraft's random systems to use faster LXM generators, improving world generation and feature placement performance, particularly in CPU bottlenecked server environments. This mod is ideal for players with decent RAM and storage who experience slowdowns due to chunk storage limitations. Faster Random generates numbers more quickly than the original CheckedRandom system, enhancing overall game performance.

Performance.title: FerriteCore
Performance.summary: Reduces Minecraft's memory usage through various optimizations, resulting in significant RAM savings. Compatible on both client and server sides, with some high-impact optimizations applicable to servers as well. Suitable for use with most mods, excluding Hydrogen due to compatibility issues with newer Minecraft versions.

Performance.title: Memoryleakfix
Performance.summary: No description available.

Performance.title: ImmediatelyFast
Performance.summary: ImmediatelyFast provides instant fast travel to any location in the game world via a dedicated keybinding. This feature allows players to quickly access remote areas, reducing travel time and increasing gameplay efficiency. The mod integrates seamlessly with Minecraft's built-in teleportation system.

Performance.title: Iris Shaders
Performance.summary: Adds advanced shaders and lighting effects to Minecraft, compatible with OptiFine shaderpacks, allowing players to enhance their game's visuals with customizable graphics. Iris Shaders supports a wide range of shaderpacks and provides detailed documentation for developers. It offers extensive customization options through its open-source nature and community-driven development.

Performance.title: Lithium
Performance.summary: Adds significant performance improvements to Minecraft by optimizing game physics, mob AI, and block ticking on both client and server sides, without changing any vanilla mechanics. This results in improved frame rates and increased responsiveness, allowing for smoother gameplay even in complex scenarios or with large numbers of entities and players. By fine-tuning the mod's configuration system, users can completely customize the optimization patches to suit their specific needs and eliminate potential bugs or conflicts.

Performance.title: Memory Leak Fix
Performance.summary: Fixes multiple memory leaks in Minecraft, improving performance and reducing memory usage on both server-side and client-side. Enhances compatibility with other mods that optimize performance and memory usage. Obsolete for Minecraft 1.20.5+ as all previous issues have been addressed natively.

Performance.title: ModernFix
Performance.summary: Improves performance and reduces memory usage in modern Minecraft versions by backporting bugfixes, patching outdated mods, and implementing optimizations. This results in faster modpack launch times, with most Forge 1.16-1.19.2 packs launching roughly twice as fast. Allows large modpacks to run on low-end hardware with minimal memory allocation.

Performance.title: Particle Core
Performance.summary: Optimizes particles in Minecraft by reducing unnecessary rendering and improving optimization techniques, significantly enhancing game performance. Enables culling of invisible particles, vertex transformations, and lightmap polling optimizations. Also provides a configuration-based system to disable or reduce specific particle types via tags or custom maps.

Performance.title: Podium
Performance.summary: Disables PojavLauncher's check for Sodium, allowing compatible renderers like LTW or MobileGlues to run without crashes, requiring Sodium 0.5.13 or newer and a supported launcher setup.

Performance.title: Sodium/Embeddium Device Check 钠/铷-设备检测
Performance.summary: Adds real-time system information display, including CPU, graphics card, memory, software, and OpenGL details. View detailed platform information to adjust image quality settings as a reference. Compatible with Sodium and Embeddium mods for an enhanced Minecraft experience.

Performance.title: Sodium
Performance.summary: Improves Minecraft client performance by optimizing rendering and fixing graphical issues, resulting in smoother gameplay and higher frame rates without compromising visual fidelity. Compatible with a wide range of mods, including Fabric, Quilt, and NeoForge. Enhances the overall gaming experience with reduced micro-stutter and increased stability.

Performance.title: Sodium Core Shader Support
Performance.summary: Enables resourcepacks to replace Sodium's core shaders with their own, allowing users to customize Sodium's visual appearance with compatible resource packs. Compatible resource packs must specifically state support for Sodium Core Shader Support. This mod does not make every vanilla resource pack work on Sodium.

Performance.title: Celeritas Dynamic Lights
Performance.summary: Adds dynamic lighting to Minecraft with improved performance and compatibility, ideal for use with mods that support deferred chunk updates such as Celeritas. For optimal results, use it in conjunction with a mod like Celeritas, which enables efficient chunk updates. This port of the original SodiumDynamicLights mod enhances visual fidelity while maintaining a smooth gameplay experience.

Performance.title: Sodium Leaf Culling
Performance.summary: Optimizes leaf rendering performance by injecting into Sodium's chunk mesh render pipeline, reducing cost of transparent leaves and improving performance in dense forests. Offers two modes: "Solid Aggressive" and "Hollow", with varying levels of visual impact. Enhances rendering efficiency without sacrificing visual quality, ideal for players using shaders in heavily forested areas.

Performance.title: spark
Performance.summary: Adds advanced performance monitoring and diagnostic tools to Minecraft clients, servers, and proxies, including a CPU Profiler, Memory Inspection, and Server Health Reporting. The CPU Profiler diagnoses performance issues such as lag and high CPU usage with minimal impact on system resources. Its customizable, easy-to-use interface produces quick, readable results that aid in identifying problematic areas for improvement.

Performance.title: Structure Layout Optimizer
Performance.summary: Optimizes Jigsaw structure generation by reducing unnecessary intersection checks and skipping redundant block checks, resulting in faster and more efficient structure creation without altering their appearance. Replaces VoxelShape with a BoxOctree to improve performance, and introduces a mechanism to skip child rigid pieces when a parent piece's Jigsaw Block is blocked off. This optimization enables the generation of high-numbered structures without significant lag spikes.

Building/Decoration.title: Amendments
Building/Decoration.summary: Amendments introduces dynamic cauldrons that store liquids and allow potion mixing, boiling, and damage inflicting. Lecterns receive an upgraded GUI with font color and style cycling, as well as hopper interaction capabilities. Additional features include improved lantern animations, hanging signs with item display and physics, and jukebox visual disc spinning.

Building/Decoration.title: Another Furniture
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds various furniture to Minecraft, designed to fit seamlessly into vanilla environments while maintaining consistent sizes and block dimensions. This mod aims to enhance home decoration without disrupting the game's aesthetic balance. Its focus on staying true to Minecraft's original style ensures a cohesive look throughout your virtual world.

Building/Decoration.title: Armor Statues
Building/Decoration.summary: Armor Statues brings dynamic, armor-wearing statues to Minecraft worlds, offering players customizable NPCs that can be equipped with various armor sets and accessories. These statues can be placed anywhere, providing a unique way to enhance world decoration and roleplay opportunities. Players can also use them as decoration or even create interactive exhibits by equipping different armor combinations.

Building/Decoration.title: Blasting Plus
Building/Decoration.summary: Blasting Plus expands vanilla smelting capabilities by making additional items smeltable in the Blast Furnace, including various stone and brick materials. The mod also introduces a unique item, the Ghast Plushie, which attracts cats and dogs when held and produces a sound effect upon right-clicking. This plushie is craftable and can be placed in the game world.

Building/Decoration.title: Carryon
Building/Decoration.summary: Carryon enhances gameplay by transforming items into 3D objects in hand and item frames, accompanied by eating/drinking animations for most food and drink items. The mod also includes custom textures for a wide range of food, including cake, as well as reworked visuals for buckets and other items.

Building/Decoration.title: Chat Heads
Building/Decoration.summary: Player heads are displayed next to chat messages, making it easier to identify different players in chat and enhancing the overall visual experience. This mod uses sender detection modes, including "Heuristic only", which can be configured through Cloth Config or Mod Menu settings. Incompatible with newer OptiFine versions (~1.20.1), use alternatives like Sodium instead.

Building/Decoration.title: Chat Animation [Smooth Chat]
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds smooth animations to chat visuals and removes message indicators and lines that separate individual messages. This results in a more visually appealing and streamlined chat experience. The mod enhances the overall aesthetic of Minecraft's chat system.

Building/Decoration.title: Chipped
Building/Decoration.summary: Expands the game's building variety with over 11,000 unique blocks, including stained glass and exotic stone textures, offering endless creative possibilities for players to build in-game structures. Allows players to craft tables that transform vanilla blocks into their chipped variants, providing a seamless way to integrate new materials into builds. Powered by Athena, Chipped offers connected textures for added depth and realism in Minecraft creations.

Building/Decoration.title: Craftable Nametag
Building/Decoration.description: [Modrinth Description]: Allows you to craft nametags!   ![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/709ad25314773e17dff9783be04ad5b348b5bc9e.png)
Building/Decoration.summary: [Modrinth Description]: Allows you to craft nametags!   ![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/709ad25314773e17dff9783be04ad5b348b5bc9e.png)

Building/Decoration.title: Elytra Trims
Building/Decoration.summary: Elytra Trims allows you to customize your elytra with armor trims and dye them in any color. You can also add banner patterns to give your elytra a unique look. This mod enhances your elytra's appearance, enabling endless customization possibilities.

Building/Decoration.title: Enchanted Vertical Slabs
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds vertical variants of all vanilla slabs, which can be crafted and placed in a similar manner to their horizontal counterparts. These vertical slabs also have unique properties, such as being flammable or fuel for furnaces, depending on the material used. They can be combined and used as block decorations, adding visual diversity to your Minecraft builds.

Building/Decoration.title: Maeschdevs Stuff
Building/Decoration.summary: No description available.

Building/Decoration.title: Grass Overhaul
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds stackable carpet-like, slab, and full sod blocks to create detailed terrain without deviating from the vanilla look. These sods feature seamless color matching with their surroundings and are compatible with texture packs, shaders, and modded maps. Additionally, it includes a control mechanism for mob spawning within these sod patches.

Building/Decoration.title: Handcrafted
Building/Decoration.summary: Handcrafted offers over 250 unique furniture pieces to enhance your Minecraft experience, allowing you to transform your blocky house into a bespoke home with fantasy, steampunk, or medieval flair. The mod caters to various tastes, from vanilla decor to elaborate themes, providing a wide range of chairs, tables, benches, and desks.

Building/Decoration.title: InmisAddon
Building/Decoration.summary: Enhances backpack models in Inmis mod with improved visuals. Designed specifically for Fabric, this addon brings a fresh look to your Minecraft experience without plans for a Forge version. Feel free to include it in your modpacks and report bugs on the GitHub page.

Building/Decoration.title: Litematica Printer
Building/Decoration.summary: Automatically places blocks around you to speed up structure building, allowing for rapid and precise construction of large-scale projects. Can be toggled on or off with a customizable hotkey, and its settings can be configured through Litematica's built-in options menu. Compatible with Fabric API and requires the Litematica and MaLiLib mods.

Building/Decoration.title: MasterCutter
Building/Decoration.summary: MasterCutter brings over 500 new recipes to the stonecutter, including woodcutting, enhanced base stonecutting, recycling, and un-crafting capabilities. This mod also introduces quality-of-life features, such as variant switching, deepslate cutting, and stone cobbled forms creation. With MasterCutter, players can unlock a wealth of new crafting options to enhance their gameplay experience.

Building/Decoration.title: More Beautiful Torches
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds over 300 variants of torches in various skins and formats, increasing decorative possibilities in Minecraft. These new torches can be crafted using different materials, including wood, stone, redstone, and more. Regular updates continue to expand the range of available torch variants.

Building/Decoration.title: Puzzles Lib
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds a comprehensive library of puzzle mechanisms, enabling creators to craft complex puzzles and challenges in Minecraft. Provides a wide range of puzzle types, including pressure plates, buttons, levers, and more, allowing for infinite creativity and variety. Enhances gameplay with an extensive set of features that simplify the process of creating engaging puzzles and obstacles.

Building/Decoration.title: Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks
Building/Decoration.summary: Reintroduces vanilla-like smooth lighting to dirt paths and other non-fluid non-full blocks, adding depth and visual interest to Minecraft terrain with customizable shadow strength and options to target specific block types or use a vanilla-accurate algorithm for path blocks lighting. Requires Sodium and has an effect only when smooth lighting is enabled. Modifies the appearance of terrain without altering gameplay mechanics.

Building/Decoration.title: Excalibur | SootyChimneys Support
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds customizable chimneys to Minecraft, featuring Brick, Cobblestone, Stone Brick, Mud Brick, Iron, Copper, and Terracotta designs that emit smoke particles. The mod supports various chimney styles, enhancing gameplay with realistic visuals. Compatible with Fabric 1.20 and below through a separate port.

Building/Decoration.title: Team Capes
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds colored capes to show team affiliation in-game, using vanilla teams' assigned colors and custom team colors where available. Players without a team or with no color assigned will retain their original cape. The mod supports both standard and wavy capes.

Building/Decoration.title: Tianjin Metro
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds a realistic and immersive transportation experience to Minecraft with its meticulously recreated Tianjin Metro system, featuring accurate stations, trains, and routes. This mod requires Minecraft Transit Railway 4.0.0 and Filters API, ensuring seamless integration into the game's transit network. With an open-source code on GitHub, players can customize and update the mod according to their preferences.

Building/Decoration.title: Underlay
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds a feature to place blocks like carpets under existing blocks in Minecraft, allowing for creative placement and decoration options. This mod includes default support for several block types and enables developers to expand this functionality through code or datapacks. Enables new building possibilities by giving players the ability to stack multiple blocks in a single space.

Building/Decoration.title: Yet Another Glowing Ores Pack
Building/Decoration.summary: Adds a subtle glow to ores in Minecraft, making them easier to spot in low-light conditions and increasing mining efficiency. Compatible with various mods that enhance gameplay, such as BetterEnd and Mythic Metals. Now you'll never miss another valuable ore again!

World Gen.title: Biolith
World Gen.summary: Enables customizable biome placement and surface generation through datapack rules and custom builders, allowing for immersive distribution of modded biomes across the world's surface. Features include adding or replacing Overworld, Nether, and End biomes, as well as registering custom surface rules and overriding vanilla surfaces. Compatible with TerraBlender and Fabric Biome API biomes, providing a flexible framework for biome modification.

World Gen.title: Enderscape
World Gen.summary: Adds a total overhaul of the End dimension with new world generation, four biomes, revamped End Cities, and hundreds of unique sounds for an immersive experience. The mod also features reworked lighting, skybox, and biome-specific fog to enhance visuals. Players can explore a more extensive and richly detailed End realm.

World Gen.title: Fabric Seasons
World Gen.summary: Minecraft receives dynamic seasonal changes, influencing biomes and crop growth. Four distinct seasons cycle every 28 in-game days, each affecting temperature, precipitation, and biome behavior. Client-side visual updates and server-side temperature adjustments create an immersive experience.

World Gen.title: Feature Recycler
World Gen.summary: Fixes feature order cycle errors in biomes by automatically recycling features to respect rules set by previous biomes, preventing crashes and logging conflicts silently. Prevents "Feature order cycle found" and "A feature cycle was found" errors. Silently logs which features may have conflicted between mods and how many crashes were prevented.

World Gen.title: Flat Bedrock
World Gen.summary: Flat bedrock layers are generated in various dimensions by default, including the overworld and nether. Additional dimensions can be easily added or configured using custom JSON files. Users can customize the flat bedrock generation for each dimension by editing values such as block types and layer generation settings.

World Gen.title: Hearths
World Gen.summary: Transforms the Nether Wastes into a hostile cave-like biome by adding netherrack spikes and magma lakes, while enhancing Crimson Forest and Warped Forest with blackstone rocks, fungal growths, and increased vegetation density. Introduces two new structures: the Crimson Tower and Warped Tower, providing loot, mobs, and vertical exploration opportunities in the Nether. Compatible with mods that alter Nether generation, but may not work with those that modify biome files.

World Gen.title: Mindful Darkness
World Gen.summary: Adds a new dimension to Minecraft, Mindful Darkness, with procedurally generated caves and ruins that shift and change as players explore. Features bioluminescent plants, mysterious artifacts, and an eerie atmosphere to challenge players in survival and adventure modes. Integrates into the game's existing exploration mechanics, offering unique experiences through its dynamic, atmospheric features.

World Gen.title: Oh The Trees You'll Grow
World Gen.summary: Enables creation of custom trees using Minecraft's structure template `.nbt` files, offering unparalleled configurability and ease of use for modders and players alike. Compatible with vanilla clients connecting to a server utilizing this library, enhancing the game's tree generation capabilities. Provides a flexible system for creating unique tree structures, extending the game's natural scenery possibilities.

World Gen.title: Repurposed Structures - Quilt/Fabric
World Gen.summary: Adds a vanilla-styled Quilt/Fabric biome variant to Minecraft's Overworld, complete with repurposed structures and features from other mods, ensuring serverside compatibility for vanilla clients. This mod expands on existing content by introducing new and varied takes on familiar landscapes. The result is a fresh, immersive experience that reimagines the game's world without adding complex mechanics or new blocks.

World Gen.title: Simple Snowy Fix (Forge / Fabric)
World Gen.summary: Fixes snow placement issue in Minecraft snowy biomes, ensuring trees look complete and natural. Includes optional feature to generate snow on leaves under other leaves for a more immersive snowy experience. Easy to install with no dependencies required.

World Gen.title: Spyglass Astronomy
World Gen.summary: Adds procedurally generated planets and stars to your Minecraft world, using scientifically accurate orbital physics to create immersive starry skies. Use the spyglass tool to draw constellations, select stars and planets, and share your discoveries with other players on a multiplayer server. Client-side commands allow for easy sharing of celestial objects and their names between players.

World Gen.title: Stoneworks
World Gen.summary: Adds a new dimension to Minecraft where players can explore and mine stone formations in a vast, procedurally generated environment. Provides advanced stone-cutting tools that enable precise excavation and extraction of resources from this dimension. Includes various biomes, structures, and terrain features to discover and exploit.

World Gen.title: Universal Ores
World Gen.summary: Adds natural generation of new vanilla ore variants for andesite, diorite, granite, tuff, calcite, blackstone, and basalt across their respective environments. These ores can now be found where they are supposed to occur in the game world. This mod requires Fabric API to function and offers a more authentic Minecraft experience by accurately representing geological formations.

World Gen.summary: Abandoned mineshafts are transformed into dynamic tunnel systems with varied layouts and hidden loot opportunities. 13 unique biome variants offer diverse environments to explore, including a rare mushroom mineshaft. Customizable mineshafts and multiple types of abandoned structures, such as workstations and miners' outposts, add depth to the game.

World Gen.title: Yungs Better Strongholds
World Gen.summary: Redesigned strongholds introduce over 15 diverse rooms, complex tunnel systems, and hidden areas, significantly enhancing exploration opportunities in Minecraft. Compatible with various worldgen mods, YUNG's Better Strongholds offers a more immersive experience while maintaining vanilla themes. The mod includes features such as traps, staircases, and diverse room types, transforming stronghold generation.

World Gen.title: YUNG's Bridges
World Gen.summary: Naturally generated bridges are added to the game, featuring over 15 types, each with biome-specific variants. Explore the world and discover these diverse bridges as you travel through different biomes. YUNG's Bridges is fully compatible with every worldgen mod, enhancing gameplay without restrictions.

World Gen.title: YUNG's Extras
World Gen.summary: Adds a wide range of structures and features to vanilla Minecraft, including ruins, ancient pillars, and rare easter egg structures. Provides enhancements to existing content, such as new and improved desert wells with potential treasures. Richly expands modpacks with its diverse collection of vanilla+ content.

Storage.title: Bundle API
Storage.summary: Allows mod authors to easily create bundles that can hold multiple stacks of items specified by an item tag, simplifying inventory management and content creation. Enables the addition of complex crafting recipes and inventory systems without extensive coding expertise. Enhances modding capabilities with a flexible and scalable bundle system.

Storage.title: EasyShulkerBoxes Supplementaries Sacks Compat
Storage.summary: EasyShulkerBoxes Supplementaries Sacks Compat integrates seamless compatibility between Easy Shulker Boxes and Supplementaries' Sacks, enabling item selection, insertion, and extraction through a convenient tooltip interface. This mod enhances inventory management by allowing scrolling through shulker box contents to select specific slots for interaction. Additionally, it supports interaction with Supplementaries Squared coloured sacks, streamlining gameplay experience.

Storage.title: Inmis
Storage.summary: Adds a Backpack mod that allows players to equip and access their inventory on demand through a Chestplate armor slot or keybind, enhancing inventory management and accessibility. Includes customization options through its configuration file for tailoring gameplay experience. Supports compatibility with other mods like Trinkets and ShulkerBoxTooltip.

Storage.title: Inventory Essentials
Storage.summary: Drag-to-transfer, single-item moves, and inventory sorting are now at your fingertips with Inventory Essentials. Control-click an item to quick-move a single stack, or use shift-control click to transfer all stacks of a specific type. Hold shift while dragging items for efficient movement, or middle-click in an inventory to sort it instantly.

Storage.title: Inventory Totem
Storage.summary: Adds automatic Totem of Undying consumption when a player would die in game, allowing them to survive and saving the used Totem from being lost. This feature provides an added layer of survival mechanics and convenience for players. Compatible with Minecraft 1.18+ on various server platforms.

Storage.title: Nether Chested
Storage.summary: Adds a new dimension to Minecraft, providing Nether-themed chests that can be used as regular storage containers in both the Overworld and the Nether. These chests have unique models and textures inspired by the game's Nether environment, adding an extra layer of immersion to your gameplay experience. They also come with their own item drops, increasing the mod's replayability and overall depth.

Storage.title: Stack to Nearby Chests
Storage.summary: Stack to Nearby Chests brings Terraria's stacking and restocking features to Minecraft, enabling players to easily organize their inventory with quick stack and restock actions. This client-side mod also introduces a new dimension of organization with selective quick stacking and favorite items that can be managed using custom keys or drag-and-drop functionality. With customizable settings for container types and item behavior, this mod streamlines inventory management and enhances gameplay efficiency.

Technology.title: Copper Rails
Technology.summary: Copper Rails introduces copper rails and rail crossings to Minecraft, enhancing minecart transport capabilities. Copper rails offer faster speeds than vanilla powered rails but degrade with oxidation, also enabling slow-speed cart control. Rail crossings allow for 4-way intersections, improving map design and rail network complexity.

Technology.title: Immersive Aircraft
Technology.summary: Adds a variety of rustic aircraft to travel, transport, and explore in Minecraft, featuring vanilla-faithful designs with detailed functionalities and medium difficulty levels. The mod includes multiplayer compatibility and offers a range of options for players to choose from, including the classic biplane. Players can expect realistic and immersive flight experiences across different terrain types.

Technology.title: Laser Bridges & Doors
Technology.summary: Laser bridges and doors form dynamically when laser source blocks are activated by redstone signals, with their length dependent on signal strength. Laser source blocks can be colored using dyes or dispensers for customization. This mod introduces futuristic-looking laser structures that update in real-time based on redstone control.

Technology.title: Redstone Pen
Technology.summary: Draws Redstone tracks more accurately with a dedicated pen and quill item, allowing for independent track routing through one block space and inspection of signal strength. The mod also introduces Block Signal Connectors to control track behavior and Redstone Relays that re-power signals to 15. These tools enhance compact wiring and simplify Redstone handling in Minecraft.

Food/Farming.title: Cultural Delights [Fabric]
Food/Farming.summary: Adds a diverse array of global food systems, including crops like Eggplant, Avocado, and Corn, as well as international meal options like sushi. It also introduces pickling mechanics, available with the Brewin' and Chewin' mod. The mod brings a variety of seafood items, including squid-related content.

Food/Farming.title: Fabric Seasons: Delight Refabricated Compat
Food/Farming.summary: Adds crop compatibility for Farmer's Delight Refabricated crops, allowing them to have different growing speeds according to the current season. Enhances gameplay by introducing seasonal variability in crop growth rates. Seamlessly integrates with Fabric Seasons: Delight Compat to provide a more realistic farming experience.

Food/Farming.title: Food Effect Tooltips [Fabric / NeoForge]
Food/Farming.summary: Adds detailed status effect information to food items in-game, including effects that apply with a percentage chance and stat changes, displayed directly in the item's tooltip. This mod works fully client-side and is compatible with other mods that display food information, such as AppleSkin. Enables players to easily view and manage the effects of various food items in their inventory.

Food/Farming.title: GrowableOres
Food/Farming.summary: Farm ores like traditional crops with GrowableOres Mod, which introduces specialized sugar cane crops that grow valuable ores such as coal and diamond. These ore canes can be planted and harvested for a convenient source of materials. With features like customizable growth rates and lava lake cultivation, players can streamline their resource gathering process.

Food/Farming.title: Hunger Tweaks (RPG Tweaks)
Food/Farming.summary: Hunger Tweaks adjusts hunger-related mechanics, allowing you to fine-tune exhaustion and regeneration rates in the game's config file. By default, exhaustion occurs at a rate of 0.5 and natural health restoration also happens at 0.5. These settings can be customized through the mod's fully configurable config/hunger_tweaks.json file.

Food/Farming.title: SNMPRD: MoreDelights
Food/Farming.summary: Adds new food items, crafting recipes, and blocks to Minecraft, expanding its culinary possibilities. Introduces unique ways to restore hunger and manage nutrition, while adding a collectible aspect through rare food items and decorative pieces. Enhances gameplay with a cozier and more realistic atmosphere, particularly when building kitchens or playing in multiplayer worlds.

Food/Farming.title: No Animal Tempt Delay
Food/Farming.summary: Removes cooldown periods when animals are attracted to their desired food, ensuring they're always tempted by it as long as they see the food in sight. This makes moving animals over long distances significantly easier. Animals will now be immediately drawn to their preferred food, eliminating wait times and tedious animal relocation.

Food/Farming.title: Replanting Crops
Food/Farming.summary: Replanting Crops automatically replants crops harvested with seeds from drops, streamlining gameplay and reducing resource gathering. By default, replanting requires a held hoe, but this can be toggled in the config for added flexibility. Holding the sneak key prevents the mod's replanting behavior from occurring, providing further customization options.

Food/Farming.title: UniversalBoneMealGrowableOresCompat
Food/Farming.summary: Universal Bone Meal fills all missing gaps where bone meal cannot be used, enabling unique growing behaviors for various plants that work with dispensers and can be individually disabled in the config. This mod integrates seamlessly with Growable Ores, allowing players to utilize bone meal's full potential. Configuration is possible through in-game mod menus or external text editors.
